description: GLENMORANGIE TALE OF TOKYO SINGLE MALT WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Inspired by visits to Japan, Glenmorangie's director of distilling and whisky creation, Dr. Bill Lumsden, decided to create this pretty single malt you see before.

Glenmorangie's A Tale Of Tokyo is the fourth release in the 'Tale of' series and the first one to be partially aged in Japanese Mizunara oak casks. It's actually a marriage of whisky aged in both sherry and bourbon barrels as well as Glenmorangie whisky aged in the rare Japanese wood.

It was all bottled together at 46% ABV and sports a label and packaging made in collaboration with celebrated Japanese artist, Yamaguchi Akira. It's their perspective of the city's contrasts and layers of history and culture that inspired the design.

Award Winning:
-San Francisco World Spirts Competition 2023
Double Gold Medal
-Scottish Whisky Awards 2023
Scotch Gold Award
  • Limited Edition

  • Comes with a Gift box

  • label and packaging made in collaboration with celebrated Japanese artist, Yamaguchi Akira. It's their perspective of the city's contrasts and layers of history and culture that inspired the design.
name: Tale Of Tokyo Single Malt Whisky 700ml

description: GLENMORANGIE CADBOLL ESTATE 15 YEAR OLD WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
With Cadboll Estate, the essence and flavor of their cherished Highland home are shared. Crafted by their whisky creators from field to glass, the third batch of this single estate whisky is described as deep and creamy, featuring notes of sweet spice and nuts.

Selected from two Cadboll harvests, this batch blends classic bourbon-matured Glenmorangie, known for its richness and creaminess, with a portion of Cadboll barley stock that has been finished in Amontillado casks for approximately a year. This finishing process introduces nutty, spicy, and sweet flavors, resulting in a beautifully integrated Glenmorangie 15 YO.

Award Winning:
-New York World Spirit Competition 2023
Double Gold Medal

-International Spirits Competition 2023
Gold Medal
  • The Cadboll barley, which gives The Cadboll Estate series whiskies their delicious creaminess and depth, is very scarce.

  • Only enough barley is grown on the estate each year for between one and two weeks of distillation.

  • Found only in the fields of Glenmorangie's 440-acre Cadboll Estate, the barley is grown, harvested, dried and malted under the watchful eye of Dr Bill Lumsden, Director of Whisky Creation.
name: Cadboll Estate 15 Year Old Whisky 700ml

long_description:
The Pogues Irish Whiskey is a new Irish whiskey, one that was exceptionally smooth and easy-drinking, but also very versatile so it could be enjoyed however you liked - neat, over ice, with a mixer or in a cocktail.

In addition, they engaged the skills of Frank McHardy, a renowned whiskey expert with 50 years industry experience (and a ‘Whisky Hall of Fame' recipient) to perfect the blend.

The Pogues Irish Whiskey is loaded with a lot of character, much like the band itself. Strong malt, citrus and cracked black pepper greet you on the nose which carries onto the palate, joining a sweetness laced with nutmeg. It is a small batch whiskey, blended of malt and grain whiskey and made using pure Irish spring water and Irish barley, malted on site at the West Cork Distillery.
name: Irish Whiskey 700ml

long_description:
Honey sweet, spicy and deep. This 12 Year Old is a rich, smooth and complex whisky, blended from specially selected single malt and grain whiskies. The result is a fully rounded blend with the perfect balance of honey, oak, fruit, spice and a creamy texture with a refreshing finish.

Hot Toddy
Serves 1
Ingredients:
- 175ml water
- 45ml whisky
- 2 to 3 teaspoons honey, to taste
2 to 3 teaspoons lemon juice, to taste
- 1 lemon round, to garnish
- 1 cinnamon stick (optional, for garnish)
In a teapot or saucepan, bring the water to a simmer and pour into a mug. Add the whisky, 2 teaspoons honey and lemon juice to taste. Stir until the honey has disappeared and add 1 teaspoon honey for more sweetness, and/or 1 teaspoon more lemon juice for more zing. Garnish with a lemon round and cinnamon stick (if using).
name: 12yo Blended Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
TOKI Suntory Whisky is a vivid blended whisky where Old meets New Japan.

Toki means time in Japanese. A vivid blend of whiskies from Suntory's Hakushu, Yamazaki, and Chita distilleries, TOKI Suntory Whisky features the quintessential characteristics of a Suntory Whisky blend: exquisite balance, harmony, and oneness. At the same time, its unique pairing of Hakushu American white oak cask malt whisky with Chita heavy-type grain whisky overturns the traditional hierarchy between malt and grain.

TOKI Suntory Whisky is silky, with a subtle sweet and spicy finish. Drinking it is perfectly simple with the TOKI Highball: a meticulous balance of the perfect whisky and soda over ice that will never go out of style.
name: Blended Japanese Whisky 700ml

long_description: Aged in American oak barrels in Melbourne, Ned starts out with hints of sweet oak and moving into flavours of spicy grains, with a lovely theme of dried fruits. Then the finish is smooth with mocha, vanilla, and dry coconut. An easy-drinking, great-tasting Australian Whisky that has been crafted for local dark spirits drinkers.
name: Australian Whisky 1l

long_description:
Born from a legacy of rebellion, this Australian Grain Whisky is a bold journey through time. In 1776 the Governor of New South Wales, John Hunter, imposed a bad on distillation. Hunter's End is a tribute to the renegades who dared to distil in defiance of prohibition, distilling not just spirit but a testament to the indomitable Aussie Spirit.

A classically smooth Australian whisky with a medium body and notes of vanilla, baking spice, toasty oak and subtle hum of white pepper with a light sweetness to complement the long finish.
name: Australian Whisky 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER BLACK SCOTCH WHISKY MIN 50ML:EA
long_description:
Indulge in the unmistakably big tasting and vibrant Johnnie Walker Black Label Blended Scotch Whisky, full of flavour with the volume turned up. Each sip bursts with layers of smooth and delicious big flavours all proudly on show creamy toffee, rich, sweet fruit and vanilla, all perfectly wrapped in a warming smoky finish. Expertly crafted by some of the world's most experienced whisky makers, this blend brings together 29+ whiskies matured for at least 12 years to create the symphony of smooth and delicious flavours of Johnnie Walker Black Label. Johnnie Walker Black Label is an incredibly smooth balance of big flavours, where no matter how loud one note is, it never drowns another one out, making it a premium choice for any occasion.
  • Some of the world's most experienced whisky makers expertly blend over 29 whiskies to create the big flavours of Johnnie Walker Black Label.

  • Indulge in the unmistakable taste of Johnnie Walker Black Label, a vibrant Blended Scotch Whisky that has won multiple awards, like Gold at the International Wine and Spirits Competition and the San Francisco World Spirit Competition in 2022.

  • Only the finest Scotch Whiskies, aged for at least 12 years, are carefully blended to achieve the perfect intensity and depth of flavour.

  • With a perfectly balanced and distinctive flavour profile, Johnnie Walker Black Label is an excellent choice whether you prefer sipping it neat, mixing it in classic cocktails such as Whisky Sour, or creating refreshing-tasting highballs.

  • Layers of smooth and delicious big flavour await in every sip of Johnnie Walker Black Label, featuring creamy toffee, rich sweet fruits, and a touch of vanilla, all wrapped in a warming smoky finish.

  • This award-winning Scotch Whisky is an impressive gift that captures the essence of smooth and smoky whiskies. The perfect gift for any tasting occasion..
name: Black Scotch Whisky Min 50ml

long_description: Aged in American oak barrels in Melbourne, Ned starts out with hints of sweet oak and moving into flavours of spicy grains, with a lovely theme of dried fruits. Then the finish is smooth with mocha, vanilla and dry coconut.
name: Australian Whisky 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER BLACK RUBY BLENDED SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Where luxury whisky meets its sweet side. Black Ruby has all the boldness of scotch but with a smooth, sweet and sophisticated vibe.

Crafted by Master Blender, Emma Walker, Black Ruby has opened up the magic of Black Label for a new generation of drinkers by selecting luscious, fruity malts from the Black Label Reserves matured in a combination of ex- wine, PX Oloroso, and bourbon casks, including smooth caramel malts from our most state-of-the-art distillery, Roseisle.

The result - a contemporary new expression that amplifies the sweetest and fruitiest notes of Black Label with honeyed richness and magnetic allure. Made for moments when the sun goes down and the vibe goes up - laughter fills the air and the night exudes promise of being one to remember.
  • Vibrant, Rich & Luscious
name: Black Ruby Blended Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: GRANT'S TRIPLE WOOD SCOTCH WHISKY 1 LITRE:EA
long_description:
Grant's has long been known as a quality blender of fine Scotch and this, the original Grant's shows you why. Silky smooth with a smoky finish it will delight every level of Scotch drinker.

TASTING NOTES: Vanilla essence and floral scents balance the flavour's complex layers.

SERVING SUGGESTION: Enjoy this whisky neat to allow the flavours to fully develop. Alternatively, add sugar, bitters and a slice of orange peel for a zesty Grant's Old Fashioned cocktail.
name: Triple Wood Scotch Whisky 1l

long_description: Now available in a 1 Litre size bottle. From the oldest operating distillery in the Scottish Highlands, Chivas Regal has been famous for its extraordinary selection of malt Whiskies. Matured for 12 years, the result is a rich and generous Whisky with honey and hazelnut notes and a long creamy finish.
name: 12yo Scotch Whisky 1l

long_description: For over a century, Laphroaig has been a quintessential Islay distillery, home to the world's highest selling single malt. Our original expression. Laphroaig 10 is the foundation of all our whisky created to bottle the nature of Islay. Expect a big peaty slap, hints of seaweed and a surprising sweetness. This robust, full-flavoured 10-year-old is brimming with signature smoke, salt and peat that builds into a dry, lingering finish.
name: 10yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
Johnnie Walker Aged 18 Years is a luxurious, award-winning Blended Scotch Whisky that perfectly balances a trilogy of flavours and textures sweet fruit, creamy smoothness and warm spice. Our expert master blenders have hand-selected whiskies from our iconic distilleries that slowly matured for 18 long years. The hand selected casks yield a supremely smooth, sophisticated Scotch Whisky. Distilleries like Blair Athol contribute notes of warming spice, while Speyside icons such as Glen Elgin impart a burst of sweet fruit. The creamy smoothness of Cardhu adds another layer of decadence, culminating in the long, sumptuous finish of this 18 Year Old Scotch. Johnnie Walker Aged 18 Years is a perfect gift for whisky connoisseurs or a remarkable addition to your home bar. Enjoy it neat or on the rocks and savour the legacy of time in every sip.
  • Crafted by our small team of expert whisky makers, this award-winning 18-Year-Old Blended Scotch Whisky is recognised as one of the finest in the world.

  • Double Gold Award Winner at the 2023 San Francisco World Spirits Competition.

  • Johnnie Walker Aged 18 Years features meticulously handpicked whiskies, slowly aged for 18 long years in our iconic distilleries. Each season contributes a layer of complexity, culminating in a whisky that blooms with flavour.

  • Unleash the full potential of this exceptional whisky by enjoying it neat or on the rocks. This luxury Scotch Whisky is the perfect way to elevate any occasion.

  • Rich, smooth, and intensely flavourful, Johnnie Walker Aged 18 Years boasts a perfect balance of sweet fruit, creamy vanilla, and warming spice. Hints of tropical citrus and smokiness linger on the long, luxurious finish.

  • The perfect gift for whisky enthusiasts, Johnnie Walker Aged 18 Years is a celebration of unrivalled balance and depth of flavour. Enjoy it for a special occasion or elevate your home bar..
name: 18yo Blended Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
From the oldest operating distillery in the Scottish Highlands, Chivas Regal has been famous for its extraordinary selection of malt Whiskies. Matured for 12 years the result is a rich and generous Whisky with honey and hazelnut notes and a long creamy finish. Chivas Regal is the perfect gift for all occasions.
  • Award-winning blended Scotch

  • Blended from whiskies aged for at least 12 years
name: 12yo Blended Scotch Whisky 200ml

long_description: The Shin Blended Whisky is crafted by Mr Ken Usami, the master blender of Shinobu Distillery who selected finest malt whiskies and finished them in casks made of Japanese Oak, Mizunara Wood Shin stands for Integrity, one of the core principles of Samurai traditionThe blended expression contains 50% malt and 50% grain The result is a unique fusion of flavours and dynamic explosion in palate yet so smooth and easy to drink Subtle chocolate and hazelnuts teamed with soft citrus notes All natural with no colouringElegant balance of smooth malt and harmonious mix of sweet spices With a hint of vanilla, caramel, and delicate fruity flavour note The palate displays subtle sweetness, with toasted bread flavour and hints of cinnamon and nutmeg Woody aftertaste with oriental sandalwood aroma on the finish
name: Blended Japanese Whisky 700ml

long_description: Hibiki, meaning “resonance”, embodies the soul of Japanese craftsmanship. Its harmonious blend resounds with calm complexity and “Wa” or “oneness.” Seductive, blossoming and enigmatic, Hibiki celebrates the unrivaled art of blending, fine craftsmanship and the sense of luxury of the House. Hibiki Japanese Harmony is the perfect introduction to Japanese whisky. Pure and noble, it offers a transparency of taste that allows for all of this whisky's complexities to be revealed simultaneously. Delicately balanced, smooth and subtly sweet, Hibiki Japanese Harmony is a blend of more than 10 malts and three grain whiskies, up to approximately 20 years old, that create an enveloping harmony of flavours and aromas.
name: Harmony Japanese Whisky 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER RED SCOTCH WHISKY FLASK 200ML:EA
long_description:
Unveil the bold and vibrant character of Johnnie Walker Red Label, the world's best-selling Scotch Whisky (IWSR). Crafted with up to 35 whiskies from distilleries including Cardhu, Caol Ila, Cameronbridge, and Teaninich, delivering a symphony of flavours. Fresh apple and citrus dance with warming cinnamon and a touch of peppery spice, culminating in a warming, smoky finish. This award-winning whisky is the perfect choice for those who enjoy whisky cocktails and long mixed drinks. For a highball, simply fill a tall glass with ice, add your favourite mixer like ginger ale, and experience the smooth, refreshing taste. An ideal gift for any whisky lover and someone who appreciates delicious long mixed drinks.
  • The world's best-selling Blended Scotch Whisky crafted from our most iconic whiskies (IWSR).

  • This iconic Scotch Whisky has won many awards, like Gold at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition in 2022 and Double Gold in 2021.

  • Every bottle of this award-winning whisky is the delicious result of blending up to 35 whiskies for a smoky and vibrant taste.

  • Perfect for mixing a delicious highball. Simply fill a tall glass with ice, add 50 ml Johnnie Walker Red Label, top with 150 ml Ginger Ale or your favourite mixer, and garnish with lemon for a refreshing-tasting and flavourful cocktail.

  • A symphony of flavours - vibrant fresh apple and citrus, warm cinnamon and peppery spice, with a touch of smoke for a truly iconic taste experience.

  • The perfect Blended Scotch Whisky for celebrations, unwinding at home or a casual get-together with friends..

  • A versatile Scotch Whisky gift ideal for those who appreciate quality and delicious whisky cocktails..
name: Red Scotch Whisky Flask 200ml

description: JOHN BARR RESERVE BLENDED SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description: Named for one of the great Whisky men of modern history, John Barr reserve blend marries single malt and grain Whiskies from the Speyside and Highland regions. This harmonious blend is smooth, elegant and refined, like its namesake who introduced the world to a richer style of Scotch Whisky, it is tradition, moved forward.
name: Reserve Blended Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
Made in the highest and coldest working distillery in Scotland, with water from a loch at 2000 feet, Dalwhinnie whisky thrives in extreme conditions - creating a liquid as sweet and accessible as its highland home is remote. Smooth and aromatic, Dalwhinnie 15 Year Old is a welcoming highland Single Malt. True to its location, the name derives from the Gaelic for 'a meeting place of sheep and cattle drovers'. A good introduction to the delights of Single Malt Whisky - elegant, smooth and medium-bodied, with a light, fruity palate and notes of heather and vanilla with a smoky, peaty aftertaste. On the nose, Dalwhinnie 15 Year Old is clean and fresh, with pears, a touch of toffee and a soft floral note. Its palate is fruity and rich with notes of steamed syrup pudding and sponge cake and even a little cinnamon and nutmeg. Each sip finishes with just enough spice to match the fruit creating a lovely balance. This award winning Malt received San Francisco World Spirits Competition Gold in 2015, 2016 and 2017, and to appreciate it fully should be enjoyed neat, or with a drop of still spring water. Dalwhinnie 15 Year Old makes an ideal gift as an introduction to Dalwhinnie and Single Malt Whiskies.
  • Crafted in Scotland's highest distillery, Dalwhinnie 15 offers a smooth & easy-drinking single malt with honey & citrus notes.

  • Matured for 15 years in American oak casks, this aged scotch boasts a rich flavour with a touch of gentle smoke.

  • Aromatic heather and a hint of smokiness greet your nose, inviting you to sip and savour.

  • Enjoy the full honeyed sweetness of Dalwhinnie 15 chilled, or savour it neat to experience its full complexity.

  • This light-bodied scotch is a great introduction to single malts, perfect for beginners or seasoned whisky lovers.

  • Nicknamed The Gentle Spirit, Dalwhinnie 15's smooth taste makes it a delightful gift for any whisky enthusiast..

  • Its name derives from the Gaelic for a meeting place of sheep and cattle drovers.
name: 15yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: CHIVAS REGAL EXTRA 13YO SHERRY CASK SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Chivas Regal Extra is an exceptionally rich and generous Chivas Regal blend crafted using a higher proportion of whiskies matured in sherry casks to deliver richer and more intense flavours incorporating a selection of our rare malt whiskies.
  • Finished in Oloroso sherry casks for added depth.

  • Rich notes of dried fruit, toffee, and spices.

  • Expertly blended with a balance of sweetness and warmth.
name: Extra 13yo Sherry Cask Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: WEST CORK BOURBON CASK IRISH WHISKEY 700ML:EA
long_description: A delicate blend of grain (75%) and malt (25%) whiskey matured in bourbon casks, with a slight citrus and cracked pepper aroma. A smooth and balanced whiskey, the taste is one of malt, lingering sweetness, citrus, apple and nutmeg.
name: Bourbon Cask Irish Whiskey 700ml

description: LEVENSIDE SPECIAL RESERVE SINGLE SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
An exceptionally smooth and full-bodied Single Malt Whisky with aromas of juicy ripe pear, apricots, and zesty lemon peel. Flavours of orchard fruits are in abundance with complex layers of vanilla and caramel intermingle with poached pear and some fresh pineapple with a soft, sweet fruity finish.

Proudly born and lovingly bred in the loch-speckled hills of the Highland whisky region of Scotland, at Levenside we seek to craft quintessentially Highland style whiskies. Internationally Acclaimed from the top shelf to the awards cabinet, Levenside's Whiskies are expertly crafted and have the medals to show for it.

Awards:
2023
  • Silver at the International Wine and Spirits Challenge 2023. 93 Points
  • Silver at the Scotch Whisky Masters 2023
  • Gold at the San Francisco Spirits Competition 2023
  • Silver at the International Spirits Challenge Whisky Awards 2023
2022
  • Gold at the International Wine & Spirits Competition Awards 2022
  • Gold at the International Spirits Challenge 2022
name: Special Reserve Single Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER RED SCOTCH WHISKY MIN 50ML:EA
long_description:
Big flavour in a small bottle. Johnnie Walker Red Label is a bold, vibrant Scotch whisky with spicy, smoky notes and a burst of zesty character. This handy 50mL mini is perfect for sampling, gifting, or taking on the go.

Whether you're trying it for the first time or need a travel-sized favourite, this mini delivers the iconic Johnnie Walker experience in a compact pour.
name: Red Scotch Whisky Min 50ml

long_description:
Cork's history of rebellion can be tracked back as far as the 9th century with the arrival of the Vikings. Its history of independence from the Viking invasions to the county's prominent role in the Irish War of Independence earned Cork the nickname The Rebel County for being the county that always fights back.

 

A smooth Irish whisky blend, aged in first fill bourbon casks, Rebel County has notes of green apple, vanilla and nutty toffee, with hints of citrus and a lingering sweetness to finish.
name: Irish Whiskey 1l

long_description: Carefully matured in the finest American oak and European oak sherry casks for at least 12 years, it is mellowed in oak marrying tuns to create its sweet and subtle oak flavours. Creamy with a long, smooth and mellow finish, Glenfiddich 12 Year Old is the perfect example of Glenfiddich's unique Speyside style and is widely proclaimed the best dram in the valley.
name: 12yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 50ml

long_description:
Grant's has long been known as a quality blender of fine Scotch and this, the original Grant's shows you why. Silky smooth with a smoky finish it will delight every level of Scotch drinker.

TASTING NOTES: Vanilla essence and floral scents balance the flavour's complex layers.

SERVING SUGGESTION: Enjoy this whisky neat to allow the flavours to fully develop. Alternatively, add sugar, bitters and a slice of orange peel for a zesty Grant's Old Fashioned cocktail.
name: Triple Wood Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER GREEN LABEL BLENDED SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description: Johnnie Walker Green Label Scotch Whisky is made entirely with single malts aged for at least 15 years from the four corners of Scotland. We've honed our craft into a precision process that respects the many elements shaping a Scotch Whisky's final flavour and character, including the type of grains and yeast used, the shape of the still, and the length of time it's matured in the cask.
name: Green Label Blended Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
The Flagship of the range and the essence of Ardbeg's house style an Islay whisky of exceptional balance and depth of flavour. Revered around the world as the peatiest, smokiest, most complex single malt in existence. Yet it does not flaunt the peat; rather it gives way to the natural sweetness of the malt to produce a whisky of perfect balance. Ardbeg Ten Years Old, is non chill-filtered and has a strength of 46% ABV, thus retaining maximum flavour, at the same time giving more body and added depth. A renowned whisky with none of the goodness taken out.

Award winning whisky:
San Francisco Spirits Competition 2024 - Gold Medal
International Spirits Challenge 2024 & 2023 - Gold Medal
World Whiskies Awards 2024
- Gold Medal for Best Scotch Islay Single Malt - 12 Years & Under
New York World Spirits Competition 2023 - Gold Medal
International Whisky Competition 2023 
- Best Single Malt Scotch 10 Years Old 2023
   1st Place:- 89.9 pts

  • Ardbeg's portfolio of Whiskies is the most awarded of all the Islay and Island Malts. Ardbeg has won 55 gold, double gold or best in class medals since 2008, a sure sign of exceptional quality and highly reassuring to consumers.

  • Matured exclusively in ex-Bourbon casks to highlight the distillery's house style, Ardbeg Ten Years Old captures Islay in a bottle, with sea spray, tarry rope and immense smoky intensity.
name: 10yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: LAPHROAIG SELECT CASK SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Laphroaig is the world's most richly flavoured Scotch Whisky, providing the most distinctive and rewarding malt
whisky experience. Founded in 1815, it is one of only a few distilleries that still uses traditional malting floors, and
dries and infuses its own malt with the thick blue smoke from old peat-fired kilns. Laphroaig Select is a whisky with
a rich peatiness as well as a smooth sweetness that really sets it apart. It is beautifully balanced due to the marriage
of multiple American and European casks of varying woods and maturations that enhance and tame the famous
Laphroaig peat. The subtly of flavour makes Select the perfect gateway to the Laphroaig family.

  • A hand selected blend of single malt casks create a unique character

  • Mix of American and European oak sherry and bourbon casks

  • Heart of spirit drawn from American oak casks, rarely used in scotch

  • Complex, deep whisky with notes of oak, peat and sweetness
name: Select Cask Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: TAMNAVULIN DOUBLE CASK SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
name: Double Cask Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: Cork's history of rebellion can be traced back as far as the 9th century with the arrival of the Vikings. Its history of independence, from the Viking invasions to the country's prominent role in the Irish war of Independence earned Cork the nickname the "The Rebel Country" for being the country that always fights back. A smooth Irish whisky blend aged in first fill Bourbon casks. Rebel Country has notes of green apple, vanilla, and nutty toffee, with hints of citrus and a lingering sweetness to finish.
name: Irish Whiskey 700ml

description: BUSHMILLS BLACK BUSH BLENDED IRISH WHISKEY 700ML:EA
long_description: Bushmills Black Bush Irish Whiskey combines a high amount of malt whiskey matured in former Oloroso Sherry casks, with a sweet, batch-distilled grain whiskey. This unique recipe means Black Bush has rich, fruity notes and a deep intense character, balanced by an incredibly unique smoothness. It's best enjoyed neat, over ice or mixed in a cocktail.
name: Black Bush Blended Irish Whiskey 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER GOLD RESERVE BLENDED SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Indulge in the luxurious world of Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve, a smooth, award- winning Bended Scotch Whisky celebrated for its sweet and honeyed tones. Every sip unveils a rich tapestry of flavour, featuring a delightful harmony of crisp apple sweetness from distilleries such as Cardhu, balanced by a touch of delicate spice from the likes of Blair Athol. Whiskies from distilleries including Cameron bridge indulge you in its smooth creaminess interwoven with refined, sweet smoke from the remote Scottish islands, all brought together by the legendary heather honey from Clynelish. This perfectly balanced masterpiece is a testament to the Johnnie Walker dedication to exceptional quality. It's the ideal choice for celebrating life's golden moments, whether it's a special occasion at home or a thoughtful whisky gift for a loved one. Experience luxury and elevate your next celebration with Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve Blended Scotch Whisky.
  • Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve is an award-winning, luxurious Blended Scotch created to celebrate the art of blending.

  • Double Gold Award Winner at the 2023 San Francisco World Spirits Competition.

  • A vibrant, stylish Blended Malt Scotch crafted using whiskies chosen for their sweet, honeyed qualities. Heather honey from Clynelish coats crisp apple sweetness from Speyside distilleries like Cardhu. Delicate spice from the likes of Blair Athol adds intrigue, while indulgent smoothness from Cameronbridge mingles with refined, sweet smoke from the remote Scottish islands.

  • Enjoy it on its own, in a Johnnie Gold & Apple Highball cocktail or straight from the freezer with salty dark chocolate on the side.

  • Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve offers a deliciously versatile taste experience. Luxuriously smooth, creamy, and honeyed, with layers of fruit, vanilla, spice, and a touch of smokiness.

  • Celebrate life's golden moments with Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve, a luxurious and award-winning Blended Scotch Whisky. The perfect whisky gift for someone you cherish and for moments of celebration..
name: Gold Reserve Blended Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: Ballantine's Finest Scotch Whisky is one of the worlds best and is blended with 50 single malt and  4 single grain whiskies. The most important of these are the signature malts of Miltonduff and Glenburgie that give the whisky it's distinct characteristics.
name: Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
Kirkcowan is single malt for those that go their own way. Kirkcowan is full on flavour, with excellent roots, and a delivery that hits at every beat. The aroma of fresh cut apples with malted biscuits and sweet sandalwood, to taste, expect a touch of vanilla fudge and refreshing citrus fruits. This single malt whisky is made in the lowlands of Scotland, a great tasting whisky aged in 100% American Oak casks.

Expect: Blissful aroma of fresh cut apples with malted biscuits, to taste, expect a touch of vanilla fudge and refreshing citrus fruits.
name: Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: Distinctive, unusual, delicious. Toasty Oak aromas with hints of sweet sherry are lifted and sweetened by floral and fruity notes. Rounded malt like flavours and the rich sherry characters are evident on the palate, with toasty oak and some what oily nuttiness to the finish. To be savoured neat or with a little water or ice.
name: Australian Whisky 200ml

long_description: Unbound by the shackles of traditional Whisky - this Australian Whisky is born and bred from the vast inland grain belts of this rugged land; the new frontier of Whisky. A seriously complex Whisky with notes of vanilla, crème caramel, toffee, dried fruit and toasted oak that finishes with a soft heat and gentle spice.
name: Australian Whisky 700ml

long_description: The largest selling Irish whiskey in the world today, Jameson has been around since 1780. It is matured in bourbon and oloroso sherry casks for between four and seven years making it famously smooth and palatable. Deep honey in colour, hints of honey and fruits with an oaky dry finish also come through showing the whiskey's complexity. Have it with sticky pork ribs or dark chocolate to compliment a dessert. Best enjoyed on itself or over ice, it's perfect for a late nightcap. The one litre bottle makes it an ideal gift too!
name: Irish Whiskey 1l

long_description:
Discover the perfect gift for whisky lovers with this elegant Glenmorangie 12 Year Old gift pack. Presented in a gift box, it includes a bottle of Glenmorangie 12 Year Old and two Glenmorangie branded rock glasses ideal for savouring every sip in style.

Now at 12 years old, The Original is as smooth and as luscious as you knew it before but now even more delicious.  It is where all whisky-making adventures begin and remains at the heart of everything Glenmorangie do. Now letting it age for 12 years in bourbon casks absorbing all manner of delectable flavours. The result is a whisky that welcomes you with a rush of citrus and holds your attention with layers of luscious flavour.

The whisky has been met with delight by the critics, who gave it a coveted gold medal at the prestigious World Whiskies Awards 2024.

  • Presented in a gift box, it includes a bottle of Glenmorangie 12 Year Old and two Glenmorangie branded rock glasses

  • Giftbox
name: 12yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
Johnnie Walker Black Ruby Whisky 50ml : ea

long_description:
Chivas Regal 18 Year Old has been created by using whiskies matured for at least 18 years which has resulted in this very special Whisky. Exceptional richness with aromas of buttery toffee, dark chocolate and dried fruit. Hints of spices and smoke combine to produce a long, warm finish.
  • Award-winning blended Scotch

  • Blended from whiskies aged for at least 18 years

  • Rich notes of dark chocolate, dried fruit, and spices.

  • Ideal for sipping, gifting, or celebrating.
name: 18yo Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: Continuing 40 years of excellence in distilling Japanese grain whiskies at Chita distillery, the House of Suntory Whisky's Master Blenders have created an outstanding single grain whisky. IN 1972,ON THE SHORES OF CHITA PENINSULA, Keizo Saji—Suntory's second Master Blender—built a distillery dedicated to creating the highest quality Japanese grain whisky. From the House of Suntory Whisky, a mild, smooth single grain whisky with unparalleled sophistication and a clean, clear finish.
name: Japanese Whisky 700ml

long_description:
Produced at the oldest distillery on the Isle of Skye, Talisker Single Malt Scotch Whisky has been made by the sea since 1830, with its smell and taste instantly connecting you to its rugged maritime home. Every sip is a taste of the Isle of Skye itself, one of the most remote, windswept yet beautiful landscapes in Scotland. Talisker Skye pays tribute to the rich varied landscape of Isle of Skye - from soft, serene shores to the dark, jagged peaks of the Cuillin mountains. Talisker Skye brings with it a well-rounded and sweet flavour profile packed with fresh citrus, sweet smoke, peppery spice and traditional Talisker maritime notes. It's matured in a combination of refill and toasted American oak casks, with a slightly higher proportion of toasted casks. Talisker Skye takes the distillery's classically rugged character and softens it out, while maintaining the smoky and sweet notes the distillery is known for. Best served neat or with a little water, or with ginger ale and a squeeze of fresh lime for a refreshing long serve. More approachable, but undeniably Talisker, it's the ideal gift for those looking to start exploring the smoky world of single malts. To learn more and for a guided tasting experience, just ask Alexa 'open Talisker tasting'.

Made by the sea on the rugged Isle of Skye, Talisker Skye Single Malt Scotch Whisky is well balanced and approachable, with a lively interplay between sweetness, smoke and spice

The Talisker family all have a peated, smoky flavour. This quality comes from the peat burned during the malting process and carries on it the salted smoke of an island battered by wind and waves. Beneath the smoke you'll find soft fruits and cereal notes, with a distinctive peppery finish

Skye is a fresher, brighter cousin to the Talisker 10 Year Old, with fresh citrus bursts and underlying sweetness, matured in a combination of refill and toasted American oak casks for depth of flavour. To learn more and for a guided tasting experience, just ask Alexa 'open Talisker tasting'

Talisker is a highly awarded family of single malt whiskies, with Skye receiving Gold at the International Wine and Spirits Competition 2017

Founded by the intrepid MacAskill brothers in 1830, Talisker is a whisky for adventurers, those happiest close to nature. It makes the perfect gift for adventurous wild spirits looking for a good way to start exploring smoky island whiskies
  • Made by the sea on the rugged Isle of Skye, Talisker Skye Single Malt Scotch Whisky is well balanced and approachable, with a lively interplay between sweetness, smoke and spice

  • The Talisker family all have a peated, smoky flavour. This quality comes from the peat burned during the malting process and carries on it the salted smoke of an island battered by wind and waves. Beneath the smoke you'll find soft fruits and cereal notes, with a distinctive peppery finish

  • Skye is a fresher, brighter cousin to the Talisker 10 Year Old, with fresh citrus bursts and underlying sweetness, matured in a combination of refill and toasted American oak casks for depth of flavour.

  • Talisker is a highly awarded family of single malt whiskies, with Skye receiving Gold at the International Wine and Spirits Competition 2017

  • Founded by the intrepid MacAskill brothers in 1830, Talisker is a whisky for adventurers, those happiest close to nature. It makes the perfect gift for adventurous wild spirits looking for a good way to start exploring smoky island whiskies
name: Skye Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: The 12 year old expression is a fine example of how the distinctively crisp, citrus character of Aberlours raw spirit is deftly softened by double cask maturation. Traditional oak and seasoned Sherry butts are both used to great effect as the mellowed spirits within are combined to deliver a subtly balanced flavour. A sweet dram with good levels of sherry spice and richness, although not overly heavy. There is a touch of welcome bitter char that reigns the dram in before it can become too sweet, providing excellent balance. Awarded GOLD at the Speyside Single Malts up to 12yo - 2018 The Scotch Whisky Masters. GOLD at the  Scotch Single Malt - Speyside - 2017 International Wine & Spirit Competition. GOLD at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2015.
name: 12yo Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER BLUE LABEL SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Unlock the ultimate whisky experience with Johnnie Walker Blue Label, a velvety smooth and vibrant Scotch crafted using rare hand-selected whiskies from the four corners of Scotland. Only 1 in 10,000 casks from our unparalleled reserves of ageing Scotch including some from long closed 'ghost' distilleries have the remarkable depth of character needed to craft this exceptionally smooth whisky. Every sip of Johnnie Walker Blue Label is a journey through a rich and complex flavour profile. Rolling waves of rich spice lead to a deep surge of vanilla sweetness and honey, with caramel and hazelnut notes coursing through dark chocolate undertones. The luxuriously long, smoky finish completes the experience. For maximum enjoyment of Johnnie Walker Blue Label, it's recommended to prepare your palate with iced water before savouring each sip. Experience the unmatched quality and craftsmanship of Johnnie Walker Blue Label and elevate any occasion with this exceptional Scotch Whisky. A gift of remarkable rarity, this Blended Scotch is an extraordinary whisky to discover the depth of flavour found only in the rarest whiskies.
  • Indulge in the ultimate whisky experience with Johnnie Walker Blue Label, a Gold Award winner at the prestigious 2023 San Francisco World Spirits Competition.

  • Velvety smooth and vibrant Scotch crafted using rare hand-selected whiskies from across the four corners of Scotland including some from long-closed 'ghost' distilleries.

  • Only 1 in 10,000 casks from our unparalleled reserves of ageing Scotch are selected to craft the exclusive depth of flavour that defines Johnnie Walker Blue Label.

  • Johnnie Walker Blue Label is best enjoyed with a sip of iced water to prepare your palate, before savouring each sip of this exceptional whisky.

  • Rolling waves of rich spice lead to a deep surge of vanilla sweetness and honey, while caramel and hazelnuts course through dark chocolate undertones. The luxuriously long, smoky finish leaves a lasting impression.

  • A gift of remarkable rarity, this Blended Scotch is an extraordinary whisky to discover the depth of flavour found only in the rarest whiskies.

  • Awarded Gold at International Spirits Challenge, International Wine and Spirits Competition and San Fracisco World Spirits Competition 2022..
name: Blue Label Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER BLACK LABEL 12YO SCOTCH WHISKY 1 LITRE:EA
long_description:
Indulge in the unmistakably big-tasting and vibrant Johnnie Walker Black Label Blended Scotch Whisky, full of flavour with the volume turned up. Each sip bursts with layers of smooth and delicious big flavours all proudly on show creamy toffee, rich, sweet fruit and vanilla, all perfectly wrapped in a warming smoky finish. Expertly crafted by some of the world's most experienced whisky makers, this blend brings together 29+ whiskies matured for at least 12 years to create the symphony of smooth and delicious flavours of Johnnie Walker Black Label. Johnnie Walker Black Label is an incredibly smooth balance of big flavours, where no matter how loud one note is, it never drowns another one out, making it a premium choice for any occasion.
  • Some of the world's most experienced whisky makers expertly blend over 29 whiskies to create the big flavours of Johnnie Walker Black Label.

  • Indulge in the unmistakable taste of Johnnie Walker Black Label, a vibrant Blended Scotch Whisky that has won multiple awards, like Gold at the International Wine and Spirits Competition and the San Francisco World Spirit Competition in 2022.

  • Only the finest Scotch Whiskies, aged for at least 12 years, are carefully blended to achieve the perfect intensity and depth of flavour.

  • With a perfectly balanced and distinctive flavour profile, Johnnie Walker Black Label is an excellent choice whether you prefer sipping it neat, mixing it in classic cocktails such as Whisky Sour, or creating refreshing-tasting highballs.

  • Layers of smooth and delicious big flavour await in every sip of Johnnie Walker Black Label, featuring creamy toffee, rich sweet fruits, and a touch of vanilla, all wrapped in a warming smoky finish.

  • This award-winning Scotch Whisky is an impressive gift that captures the essence of smooth and smoky whiskies. The perfect gift for any tasting occasion..
name: Black Label 12yo Scotch Whisky 1l

long_description: The principal expression available globally is Bell's Original, which comprises up to 40 different malt and grain whiskies. The "'heart malt' of Bell's is Blair Athol, while the Speyside malt of Dufftown and the Lowlander Glenkinchie help to shape the blend's character, along with a quantity of Caol Ila from Islay, which adds a touch of island influence. Overall, Bell's Original may be summed up as offering soft grains and spices on the floral and fruity nose, with a sweet, nutty, malty and spicy palate, which yields just a hint of peatiness.
name: Blended Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: Lucky Sod is a combination of dark Irish Whiskey, smooth vanilla, and toffee caramel flavours. Delicious served straight up as a shot or over ice. It is also highly mixable - great served long with cola, or as a chaser alongside your favourite beer. What is Lucky Sod? It is a liqueur made form Irish Whiskey. The lucky black bog cat is said to give prosperity and happiness to anyone with whom it crosses path. He has used up most of his nine lives but he is still going strong.
name: Irish Whiskey Liqueur 700ml

description: BLACK HOUND BLENDED MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Made with a blend of only the finest single malts from the Highlands, this whisky is approachable and accessible - fruity and framed by a great balance of spice and vanilla and finishes with a subtle smoky aroma. The illicit whisky trade was risky business indeed. Feared throughout the Highlands was exciseman Malcolm Gillespie and his vicious black dog. Gillespie confiscated the best batches of whisky from smuggles across the Scottish Highlands, blending them into his very own highly convert malt 'Blackhound'.

Beware of the Blackhound at your local Liquorland store. Awards: Double Gold San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2022. Gold Medal IWSC iwsc.net 2022. Gold Winner Melbourne International Spirits Competition 2022. Blended Scotch Of The Year Melbourne International Spirits Competition 2022. Gold The Spirits Business Global Scotch Whisky Masters 2023.
name: Blended Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml
Glenfiddich 12yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 200ml : ea

description: LOCH LOMOND SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 3X50ML:EA
long_description: Since 1814, Loch Lomond has been producing world class whiskies. They are a gold medal winning distillery winner of the '2017 Best Single Malt Distillery in the World' at the Berlin International Spirits Competition 2017.Loch Lomond gift pack contains 1 bottle 50mL miniature each of: -  Original Single Malt Scotch Whisky. -  12 YO Single Malt Scotch Whisky. -  18 YO Single Malt Scotch Whisky.
name: Single Malt Scotch Whisky 3x50ml

long_description: Matured for 12 years, Chivas Regal Scotch Whisky hails from the oldest operating distillery in the Scottish Highlands. This is a rich and generous whisky with honey and hazelnut characters. Sold in a 50ml serve.
name: 12yo Scotch Whisky 50ml

description: THE SEXTON SINGLE MALT IRISH WHISKEY 700ML:EA
long_description:
An unexpected Irish single malt, The Sexton is rich in hue and bold in taste. Exclusively matured in former oloroso sherry casks (for four years) to achieve a perfect balance between rich, dried fruits and memorable toasted oak notes to offer a smooth finish and leave you wanting for more.
Triple distilled in copper pot stills, the liquid is approachable in taste and memorable in character.
The Sexton is a single malt made with a respect for tradition and a passion for innovation.

  • Made from 100% Irish malted barley

  • Exclusively matured in former oloroso sherry casks

  • Triple distilled in copper pot stills
name: Single Malt Irish Whiskey 700ml

long_description:
Immerse yourself in the rugged maritime heritage of the Isle of Skye with Talisker 10 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky. Made by the sea since 1830, this whisky instantly connects you to its windswept yet elegant landscapes with every sip. As the stalwart of the Talisker family, this powerful Single Malt boasts a sea-salty nose, spicy complexity, and a smoky-sweet character. It's famous for its rich, intense peat-smoke flavour, culminating in a warm peppery finish like a hearty welcome from a wild sea. Double distilled and meticulously aged for a minimum of 10 years in American oak casks, Talisker 10 Year Old embodies the unique characteristics of a coastal whisky. Its deep, rich character and appetising sweetness make it perfect to enjoy neat or on the rocks. A winner of Gold awards at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition in 2022 and 2023, Talisker 10 Year Old is one of the most awarded Single Malt Scotch Whiskies in the world. Its robust flavour adds an intense depth to whisky cocktails, making it a versatile addition to any collection. This exceptional whisky is an ideal gift for those who share the wild spirit of Talisker's founders, who braved the seas to establish the distillery on the Isle of Skye in 1830. Experience the smoky, peppery, and warming flavour of Talisker 10 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky today.
  • Talisker 10 Year Old is a celebrated choice among whisky lovers, boasting Gold medals from the San Francisco World Spirits Competition in both 2022 and 2023.

  • Double distilled for a rich, deep character, Talisker 10 Year Old embodies the maritime essence of coastal whisky and is aged for a decade in American oak casks.

  • Ruggedly maritime with every sip, Talisker 10 Year Old offers a captivating balance of sweet smoke, peat, and a lingering peppery finish.

  • Hailing from the oldest distillery on the Isle of Skye, Talisker has been made by the sea since 1830. Its aromas and taste instantly connect you to its rugged maritime home with every sip.

  • The subtle warmth and smokiness of Talisker 10 Year Old is best appreciated neat or on the rocks. Ideal for enjoying with oysters.

  • Make celebrations memorable with the rich, smoky flavours of Talisker 10 Year Old, offering a true taste of the untamed Isle of Skye..

  • Talisker Whisky, Made by The Sea for those who thrive on adventure and nature, makes an ideal gift for wild spirits eager to explore the realm of smoky island whiskies..
name: 10yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: With over 140 years of experience and a balanced blend, High Commissioner Whisky is a great everyday dram. A blend selected from the finest grain and malt whiskies, High Commissioner has flavours of soft fruits, peach, pear and chewy caramel. Sweet and fruity with notes of malted barley, overlaid with a touch of peat. Well balanced and complex with a long smooth warming finish.AWARDS: -  Silver Medal 2015 Hong Spirit Awards. -  Bronze Medal 2016 San Francisco World Spirits Competition. -  Silver Medal 2019 San Francisco World Spirits Competition. -  Silver Medal 2020 San Francisco World Spirits Competition. -  Gold Medal 2020 Melbourne International Spirits Competition.
name: Blended Scotch Whisky 1l

long_description:
Aged for a minimum of 15 years and selectively finished in Grande Champagne Cognac casks, this unique whisky is luxuriously fruity and deliciously sweet. The subtle influence of the cognac makes it the ultimate way to elevate your night out.
  • Award-winning blended Scotch

  • Blended from whiskies aged for at least 15 years

  • Aged 15 years with a cognac cask finish.

  • Notes of honey, fruit, and warm spices.

  • Luxurious and refined for special occasions.
name: Xv Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: During barrel aging a drop of whiskey is lost to evaporation and is sacrificed to the heavens, often referred to as the Angels Share. Three Angels Irish Whiskey uses a unique Holy Trinity blend of Grain, Pot and Malt Irish whiskey to deliver a silky smooth taste. This blend leads with sweet notes of honey which are followed up with cereal and peppery notes to finish, creating a silky smooth whiskey.
name: Irish Whiskey 700ml

description: MONKEY SHOULDER BLENDED MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Monkey Shoulder is a premium Scotch Whisky that is steeped in history and culture and to this day is still tended by hand by the experienced Malt Men of Speyside. A smooth and rich 'triple' malt Scotch (a world first!) that has been blended from three of Speyside's finest single malts and using batches from only 27 casks to produce this fine malt whisky. A delightful nose of sherry, cinnamon baked pear, butterscotch, barley, strawberry and Bourbon vanilla which are all complemented by tangy, sweet nut, citrus, mint, oak and orange peel flavours.

TASTING NOTES: Mellow vanilla with sweet cooking spices.

SERVING SUGGESTION: Fill a tall glass with Ice. Pour in Monkey Shoulder whisky and dry ginger ale. Gently stir and garnish with an orange wedge.
name: Blended Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: THE GLENLIVET CARIBBEAN RES. SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
To create whisky with a tropical feel, our makers finished a portion of our smooth whisky in barrels that previously held Caribbean rum. The result is a well balanced and exceptionally smooth whisky. Single malt, meet summer.
  • Finished in ex-Caribbean rum barrels

  • Award winning single malt
name: Glenlivet Caribbean Reserve Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description: Aged in American oak barrels in Melbourne, Ned starts out with hints of sweet oak and moving into flavours of spicy grains, with a lovely theme of dried fruits. Then the finish is smooth with mocha, vanilla, and dry coconut. An easy-drinking, great-tasting Australian Whisky that has been crafted for local dark spirits drinkers.
name: Australian Whisky 200ml

long_description: Traditional winemaking techniques and an eye to modern styles allow us to create wines that are synonymous with the regions they are from. Rich, honest wines that showcase the regions in their most natural light. Pepperjack Chardonnay is a modern style with aromas of white peach and grapefruit with subtle nutty oak. The palate is balanced with ripe stone fruits with a slatey acidity which gives length and complexity to the finish.
name: Chardonnay 375ml

long_description: The wine has great structure, with a burst of diverse flavors across the palate. Rich butter notes envelop the senses, along with hints of peach and nectar. The oak adds volume and strength to the mid-palate, showcasing rich stone fruit flavors, including fig, green melon, lime, and pineapple. The texture is generous and mouth-filling, leaving a long, lingering finish.
name: Buttery Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: The 20th of July 1969 is a significant date in Taylors history; not only was it the day that astronaut Neil Armstrong took one small step on the surface of the moon, but also the day that Bill Taylor set foot on, what was the become the renowned Taylor family vineyard. While one stepped on the barren lunar surface, the other stepped on rich terra rossa soils with the hope and determination to craft wines to rival the world's best.
name: One Small Step Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: A single sip of Wente Chardonnay was enough to leave the entire tasting panel with the lasting impression that above all else, balance is central in Wente's winemaking philosophy. When you delve into the winemaking techniques adopted this is reaffirmed; 50% of the wine is fermented in French oak while the other 50% is fermented in stainless steel tanks. It was in this balance that we found a clear winner.Each summer morning, fog billows inland through the Golden Gate, pushed by Pacific wind streams into the bowl of the San Francisco Bay. Here, it forms deep fog banks that rest on the East Bay Hills. In just one place, the Livermore Valley, with its unique East-West orientation, the fog banks come further east, cooling the air as it goes. This daily phenomenon creates the Mediterranean or Marine climate found in less than 1% of the world's land mass and it makes the San Francisco Bay and Livermore Valley appellations ideal for growing wine grapes that are beautifully balanced.
name: Morning Fog Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: Perfect for everyday enjoyment this Chardonnay is from South East Australia. It has tropical and stonefruit flavours that make it very easy drinking. A solid choice to serve with seafood and chicken dishes.
name: Vr Chardonnay 1l

long_description: At release, the wine is a pale straw with a slight green hue to the edge. The wine has delightful aromas of white peach, nectarines and subtle citrus zest join hints of cashew and cream. Fresh flavours of stone fruit combine with cashews and an underlying toastiness from the barrel fermentation to deliver a mouth-filling, enjoyable wine. It has a clean, elegant palate, a zesty acid backbone and long, persistent finish. The wine was matured in French oak (mostly 2 and 3 year old) for a period of 10 months prior to being bottled. Crafted for immediate enjoyment but will cellar for a short term under ideal conditions.
name: Estate Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: An elegant Southern French Chardonnay that combines volume and freshness. White flowers on the nose evolves into notes of citrus and white-fleshed fruits on the palate with a lingering mineral finish. A lovely accompaniment to white fish and pasta dishes. Best served slightly chilled.
name: Terre De Providence Chardonnay 750ml

long_description:
The 2023 Clonale opens with pure fruit aromatics of grapefruit, citrus blossom and white stone fruit flesh that transcend to notes of fresh cream and almond and a hint of flinty reduction in the background providing complexity and intrigue. 

The palate is fresh and vibrant with a concentrated core of fruit. Creamy textural elements from barrel fermentation are woven seamlessly into the fruit, and the bright line of acidity provides length and a chalky finish.
  • Fermentation commenced spontaneously with ambient yeasts.
name: Clonale Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: Medium weight with clean citrus fruit supported by well integrated French oak and balanced acidity. Great structure and length in the finish, this wine shows typical cool climate characteristics.Yering Station's Little Yering Chardonnay is consistently one of the best value Australian Chardonnays around. Crafted from Yering Station's young vines, this wine offers a creamy, nutty complexity with freshness and elegance. With some quality subtle French oak, complimented by bright citrus and peach flavours; thos offer super Chardonnay drinking at this price.
name: Little Yering Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: This Californian Chardonnay is rich with loads of yellow peach, fig and lemon curd, which pleasantly meld to full of intriguing secondary notes of spice, toast and butterscotch with textural nutty complexity. The depth of the palate extends from the attractive structural acidity culminating in a zesty, clean finish of tangerine and grapefruit.
name: Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: Wynns Coonawarra Estate Chardonnay demonstrates that Coonawarra offers a suitable environment for both fine whites as well as premium red wines. The long ripening season from Coonawarra's cool southerly climate produces Chardonnay with excellent varietal character. Nectarine, poached pear and cashew nut flavours balance the soft natural acidity. Subtle spicy oak characters produce an elegant, beautifully balanced and textured Chardonnay.  Sue Hodder, Winemaker.
name: Wynns The Siding Chardonnay 750ml : ea

long_description: On release the wine is a very pale straw colour with a youthful green hue. It has intense lifted aromas of peach, nectarine and melon with hints of honey and nutmeg. There are underlying citrus notes and subtle secondary oak characters of cedar and spice. A rich and welcoming varietal palate which is fresh and mouth filling. Round, fleshy, varietally charged with white peaches and nectarines. The palate is also savoury, complex, layered, and inviting with a fresh, clean and persistent finish. The Clare Valley parcel delivers mid palate fleshiness whilst the Adelaide Hills component contributes restrained fruit characters and a hint of minerality that is typical of this region. Overall, this is a wine designed to enjoy with food. A small percentage of the wine was barrel fermented and then the entire parcel was matured in premium French oak for a period of 10 months prior to bottling.
name: Jaraman Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: This Whispers Chardonnay has toasty, tropical fruit aromas and is bursting with flavours of ripe melon, peaches and cream. We recommend having them with fresh seafood, like simple fish and chips. It also suits soft cheeses like brie and mascarpone.
name: Chardonnay 750ml

long_description:
This fruit forward and textural wine is a great example of the kind of wines Tasmania's cool climate can produce. A Chardonnay, displaying pristine acidity and lifted notes of ripe stone fruit, toasted almonds, and oak spice, this is one superb Australian drop. Crafted from hand-selected fruit from our premium Tasmanian vineyards, you'll find it hard to walk past a Tasmanian chardonnay once you've experienced this sensation. 

Awards:
  •  Silver/91 Points at the International Challenge Wine Winner in 2022
  •  Gold at the Critics Challenge International Wine & Spirits Competition in 2023.
name: Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: With careful oak treatment, this Chardonnay offers the best of both worlds. A touch of toasty spice can be tasted alongside generous citrus and orchard fruit character. Fans love the long, fresh finish and serve this wine with generous and round pasta and white meat dishes.
name: Grazier Chardonnay 750ml

long_description:
Lifted aromas of citrus and stone fruit with notes of tropical fruit and pineapple. An approachable and full-bodied Chardonnay that shows great length and persistence. Medium weight with a creamy texture and hints of butterscotch and lemon meringue pie. Delicious paired with Camembert cheese, pan-seared salmon, or other white meat dishes.
  • Buttery Chardonnay

  • New Zealand Wine

  • Gold Winner at Melbourne International Wine Competition
name: Chardonnay 750ml

Grapefruit, chalk, milk products and a flush of brilliant white peach. Its best, arguably, is yet to come.' - 94 Points, James Halliday.

Bright pale straw. Harmonious fine fruit with savoury complexities. Bright on the nose with citrus peel, green apple, nashi pear, white peach and nectarine with undertones of jasmine, grapefruit pith and limestone. The palate is creamy and soft, yet focused, showcasing lemon curd, grapefruit and green pawpaw. There is a pristine freshness to this wine revealing a saline mineral edge and a beautiful balance. The finish is fine, delicate, savoury and long with an intriguing soft chalky texture. 
  • An earlier drinking style with alluring savoury nuances from Vasse Felix's quality-led, minimal intervention winemaking approach.

long_description:
Established in 1985, Cloudy Bay was one of the first five wine makers to venture into Marlborough. Chardonnay, the widespread international aromatic grape variety, has proudly been part of the portfolio since 1986. Senior Winemaker Tim Heath said of this deliciously savoury Chardonnay: Impressive in its youth, this is a wine to watch.

Cloudy Bay Chardonnay is one for connoisseurs and gastronomic adventurers: refined, poised and balanced. Painstakingly made using traditional techniques, it is a true 'food wine'. Fruit from vineyards in the stony soils of Wairau Valley and the dense clay of the Southern Valleys work together to create a wine that marries ripe stone fruit and citrusy elegance.

  • A seamless, integrated and elegant regional benchmark with complexity derived from traditional wine making techniques

The palate has a lovely weight with nice fruit intensity with flavours of white peach, citrus and a hint of nougat. This finish is clean and refreshing with a vibrant acidity. By buying this Chardonnay you've done a drop of good because we are giving 50c from every bottle purchased to Clean Up Australia.

The Bulloak range draws its name from the majestic stand of Bulloak (Buloke) trees located at our Zilzie property, providing a scenic backdrop to our vineyards and winery. Y Series Pinot Grigio is fruity and vibrant, with flavours of baked apple and pear, accompanied by a refreshing acidic and creamy finish, pairing perfectly with a range of different foods.

long_description: At release, there is a bright, vibrant clarity to the wine. It has a very pale straw colour and subtle green highlights to the edges. At release, the wine displays lifted fresh and vibrant aromas. Kaffir lime and lemon characters abound, followed by layers of subtle blossom and enticing floral rosewater nuances. The wine displays intense citrus fruit characters of fresh lemon and lime along with hints of orange blossom. Through the mid-palate there is excellent fruit presence with zesty fresh lemon and lime characters. The finish is crisp, clean and persistent. Crafted for immediate enjoyment but will cellar over a short term under ideal conditions.

description: THE CRAFTY PUNTER CLARE VALLEY RIESLING 750ML:EA
long_description: The passion and love that the Pike family have for winemaking stem from their late, great, patriarch: Edgar Pike. Edgar was a fantastic grape grower, spending long days in the vineyard through the heat and cold. A day at the races was his escape, and Edgar's knack of picking a winner is something of a family legend. This wine is named after Edgar - The Crafty Punter. This elegant Riesling is bone dry with refreshing acidity and mouth-watering flavours of tangy lemon and lime. Cosy up with freshly shucked oysters, spicy Asian food, or apple pie.

long_description:
Jacob's Creek Classic range offers fresh, great tasting wines across a wide selection of popular varieties and blends. Created to drink now, our Classic wines are ideal for those who seek excellent value and reliable quality for every day enjoyment. A beautifully balanced Riesling with bright persistent flavours and the potential to cellar for up to five years.

long_description:
Wine has been flowing in the Clare Valley since 1851 and is an integral part of the culture. A small area, accounting for less than 1.5% of Australia's total wine production, it is one of Australia's most prestigious premium wine regions, most famous for its Riesling and Shiraz. With its beautiful rolling hills, ideal winter rainfall, and Mediterranean climate, the Clare Valley carries a unique history and winemaking heritage.

Explosive florals, fresh lime, and citrus combine with a hint of rockmelon and wet limestone on the nose. The entry is driven by the nose, with a heap of fruit weight. Chalky in texture with white floral, citrus flavours, and a juicy finish.

  • One of Australia's most prestigious premium wine regions, most famous for its Riesling and Shiraz.

long_description: We simply love this wine here at Liquorland, crisp acid driven wine, plenty of fresh lime and other citrus flavours. More delicate than recent years, the balance of palate weight, acid and barely-there sweetness creates a seamless and lengthy finish. Delicious.

Light green in colour with a citrusy aroma, the palate is dominated by crunchy Granny Smith apples coupled with grapefruit blossom. The result is a fresh, delicious blend with a chalky mouthfeel that makes a great match with chicken, salmon and tuna.

  • The first Riesling vineyard planted in Eden Valley over 170 years ago.

  • The vineyards are typified by lean soils, high altitude, warm days and cool nights.

long_description: The grapes for the Winton Road Riesling are carefully harvested from selected older vineyards in the Barossa and Eden Valley. The Barossa winemaking history dates back to the 1840s with Riesling wines being brought to the region by the German and Silesian settlers. These low yielding Riesling vines give structure to the palate while maintaining its refreshing acidity and complementing the fruit and floral characters in the wine. A bright lemon colour with aromas of apple blossom, mandarin zest and wet stone. A structured Riesling with great intensity. The orchard fruit and citrus characters are balanced by a refreshing acidity and chalky minerality. The finish is bright, pure, and long.

long_description:
Four Words, New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc. Kim Crawford is one of New Zealand's top wine producers. The winery started out in a small cottage in Auckland New Zealand and since is launch in 1996, the brand has overcome a lot to achieve greatness. 
Kim Crawford Sauvignon Blanc white wine is fresh and juicy with ripe, tropical flavors of passion fruit, melon, and stone fruit. Each sip of wine reveals classic Marlborough sauvignon blanc aromas of lifted citrus, tropical fruit, and crushed herbs, along with vibrant acidity and plenty of weight and length on the palate. This New Zealand sauvignon blanc is made with grapes specially selected from vineyards in Marlborough's Wairau Valley and the neighboring Awatere Valley. Pair this Kim Crawford white wine with fresh oysters, asparagus, lobster, or a light salad. For optimal taste, refrigerate this sauvignon blanc wine for at least two hours then serve chilled.

  • Screw top makes this bottle of wine easy to open without additional tools

  • White wine with ripe flavors of passion fruit, melon, and stone fruit

  • Refreshing, juicy New Zealand wine with bright acidity and a weighted finish on the palate.

  • Table white wine featuring grapes from select vineyards in Marlborough's Wairau Valley and Awatere Valley.

  • Fruity wine pairs well with fresh oysters, asparagus, lobster, or light salads.
