description: VILLA MARIA PRIVATE BIN SAUVIGNON BLANC 750ML:EA
long_description: This is the Sauvignon Blanc that put Villa Maria on the world map. A blend of both Marlborough's Wairau and Awatere Valleys our winemakers take great care to ensure this wine showcases exceptional balance and consistency every vintage. The room-filling aromatics and strikingly crisp character of our Private Bin Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc are why it is so popular and such a memorable experience.
name: Private Bin Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Showing excellent varietal character from the Murray Darling & Swan Hill regions of Victoria. Pale straw with green hues. Citrus with passionfruit aromas and a hint of grassiness. This is a vibrant wine with refreshingly crisp acidity.
name: Bulloak Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

description: TWO CHURCHES THE PREACHER SAUVIGNON BLANC 750ML:EA
name: Two Churches The Preacher Sauvignon Blanc 750ml : ea

description: CRAGGY RANGE TE MUNA ROAD SAUVIGNON BLANC 750ML:EA
long_description: From the lower terrace of our Te Muna Road Vineyard in Martinborough, this wine is sourced exclusively from several parcels of vines growing on stony, limestone influenced soils. Leafy fresh herbs and lime citrus make for a refreshing nose. The palate delivers a refreshing swathe of nectarine and tropical melon fruit flavours, perfect to drinking now...The complexity and depth of flavour of this wine sets it above your ordinary Kiwi Sauvignon. Flavours of classic lemons and limes, tropical fruit, nectarine and fresh minerality ties it all together.
name: Te Muna Road Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Loved around the world, Lindeman's Bin Series wines are approachable in style and consistent in quality with global appeal. Designed to be enjoyed time and time again, these are wines people simply love to drink. Since 1843, Linderman's has crafted vibrant, quality wines which enjoy long-lived global popularity. This Lindeman's Bin 95 Sauvignon Blanc has flavours of passionfruit, grapefruit, gooseberry and guava.
name: Bin 95 Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

description: JAMIESONS RUN GRAZIER SEM SAUV BLANC 750ML:EA
long_description: This white wine brings together two aromatic varieties, Semillon and Sauvignon Blanc. Put your nose in the glass and take in the orchard, citrus, and grassy notes that lead into juicy tropical and citrus flavors. Chill and pop with with fresh and light meals.
name: Grazier Sem Sauv Blanc 750ml

long_description: Pale straw in colour, this wine is filled with aromas of pineapple and citrus with subtle hints of gooseberries and passionfruit. The palate displays appealing tropical fruit flavours with an underlying lemon and lime zing. With tremendous length of flavour and a long lingering finish, this is a wine that can be enjoyed with food or just as easily on its own.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: The small portion of barrel ferment makes all the difference in taking this wine to the next level above the realms of other Sauvignon Blancs. It's elegant but boasts surprising power. The result is a wine with a punchier nose than preceding years whilst maintaining the Catalina house style of delivering a textured and rich palate balanced with fruit precision and focus. Aromatically, the wine displays attractive grapefruit and white currant notes, with tropical fruits and crushed herbs in support and a perfectly balanced palate finishing refreshingly long and mouth-watering. 'Gently tangy sauvignon blanc with lime zest, passionfruit and peppery capsicum flavours. Subtle fruit sweetness contrasts nicely with the wines grassy character. An ethereal texture adds further appeal.' - Rating: 91 Points   Bob Campbell.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Our Sauvignon Blanc from the Blind River region brings ripe citrus aromas melded with tropical fruits. Laden with juicy rock melon, vibrant stone fruits and a fresh blackcurrant leaf aspect, this wine has a long vibrant finish.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description:
Jacob's Creek Classic range offers fresh, great tasting wines across a wide selection of popular varieties and blends. Created to drink now, our Classic wines are ideal for those who seek excellent value and reliable quality for every day enjoyment. The nose is lifted and fragrant with passionfruit and varietal asparagus. The palate offers tropical and herbacious flavours and a delightful crisp finish.
  • CONTAIN SULPHITES

  • Preservative (220) added
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description:
A tropical nose full of passionfruit, lemongrass, and grapefruit. There is a lovely roundness to the palate which is bursting with freshness. The finish is vibrant and lively and is marked by fresh citrus and wildflowers. A classic Tasmanian cool climate Sauvignon Blanc.

Awards:
  • Gold Winner Melbourne International Wine Competition 2023.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: At release the wine is a very pale straw with a green edged hue. The wine has tropical aromas of passionfruit and guava with a hint of freshly cut grass. This wine has a crisp and zippy palate with regional varietal flavours of tropical fruit up front and then gooseberry and some herbaceousness across the mid-palate. There is a naturally delicate, cleansing acidity to the wine with a soft, persistent finish. Crafted for immediate enjoyment.
name: Estate Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Excellent length, building intensity on the backpalate, finish and aftertaste. It is easy to see why this wine outperforms and why it attracts so many repeat buyers. It is bursting full of ripe fruit flavours from start to finish, and will stand up to almost any seafood, pasta or white meat dish.
name: New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: The Mud House Sauvignon Blanc has classic tropical fruits are complemented by zesty grapefruit acidity giving the wine a juicy and refreshing finish.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description:
Our founder, Peter Lehmann, created Portrait wines to ‘paint a picture'
of our home and the iconic wine regions of South Australia.
The series of wines are crafted to express the unique characteristics of
their origin and are made to be vibrant and approachable.
This Sauvignon Blanc is light and crisp with aromas of passionfruit and
subtle herbal notes. Lush tropical fruit flavours are balanced
by a clean and crunchy acidity.
A beautifully refreshing wine, well suited as an aperitif
or paired with seafood.
name: Portrait Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Margaret River never ceases to amaze us with an array of amazing reds and whites - such as this super scrumptious blend. An Abbey Vale creation from their winery located in the Yallingup Hills, this sauvignon blanc semillon is fresh, flinty and aromatic with a pale hue. With a portion of barrel ferment, this wine has added X-factor and unstoppable flavour the lingers on after the last mouthful. A white wine that is solid enough in flavour to cut through classic fish and chips with tartare sauce.
name: Sauvignon Blanc Semillon 750ml

long_description: Rapaura Springs continues to produce high quality, award winning wines from New Zealand's most recognized wine region. Its recently just been crowned Gold - New Zealand Wine International Wine Show 2016. We love this Savvy, it exhibits classic tropical notes as well as citrus and fresh herbs flavours. It combines complexity and structure with clean cut acidity, providing an exceptional premium style at an affordable price point. Located in the heart of the Wairau Plains Springs Belt the water is crystal clear and perfectly pure, enabling the vineyards to produce outstanding fruit with minimal intervention. AWARDS: Gold at the New Zealand Wine International Wine Show 2016. Gold at the San Francisco International Wine Comp 2017.
name: Reserve Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Proud Producers of New Zealand's First Sauvignon Blanc. At Matua, a Māori word meaning 'Head of the Family,' we've been producing award winning wines for over 40 years. Sourced from the premier cool climate region, Marlborough, this fresh, crisp and aromatic Sauvy is best served chilled.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml : ea

long_description: Incredible value for money, this wine comes full of crisp, delicate gooseberry aromas with intense tropical fruit flavours. The St Andrews Sauvignon Blanc is best matched with poached or steamed delicate fish such as tuna or trout, accompanied by green vegetables like green beans and kale to bring out their flavours. A worthy addition to any shopping basket and an instant crowd pleaser, this one litre bottle also makes it a handy gift, or perfect for group parties.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 1l

long_description: The bouquet of Whispers Sauvignon Blanc is clean and fresh, with the aromas of gooseberries and limes, balancing full tropical flavours on the palate. It is the type of wine ideal for parties out in the sun, so all you have to do is put it on ice and let it chill. Pair back with grilled prawns straight off the BBQ.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Traditional winemaking techniques and an eye to modern styles allow us to create wines that are synonymous with the regions they are from. Rich, honest wines that showcase the regions in their most natural light. Pale straw in colour with a palate that is refreshing, textural and layered demonstrating flowers of citrus and grapefruit
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Classic French quality on offer here in this Sauvignon Blanc. Lemon yellow in colour with hints of green. The aroma is delicate and fruity with underlying hints of pear and citrus. The taste is dry and fruity, with a balanced flavour and finish.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description:
Sauvignon Blanc is best known for its drinkability. It is a crisp wine with delicious flavours and a high refreshment factor. 
  • The Casella family has been crafting wines for generations; the samefamily traditions and passion carry on today through [yellow tail].

  • Great tasting Australian wine that brings a smile to everyone's lips!
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: This lovely crisp Sauvignon Blanc features fresh tropical notes with hints of passionfruit and citrus. The palate is bright and lively with a clean along with passionfruit and lychee supported by refreshing natural acidity. Perfect for casual BBQs.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: The Hardys VR Semillion Sauvignon Blanc has concentrated fresh citrus and grapefruit flavours with a herbal crunch. This blend displays a good level of complexity with a fresh crisp finish.
name: Vr Semillon Sauvignon Blanc 1l

long_description:
At 9% alcohol volume, this is a great lighter option if you're feeling like a drop of white wine. In classic varietal style, this sauvignon blanc showcases flavours of tropical passionfruit with a touch of crisp green apple. Bought to you by the team at Zilzie Wines, it's a great drop to have for those warm days out in the backyard with friends and family. This Victorian wine is best served chilled to truly appreciate it's tropical aromas.

  • Only 9% Alcohol
  • Only 84 Calories Per 150mL Serve.
name: Liv Lighter Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: On release the wine is a very pale straw colour with a youthful green hue. It has intense lifted aromas of tropical passionfruit along with freshly cut grass and subtle mineral salt. The wine is vibrant and lively with delicious flavours of passionfruit and green apple along with some subtle herbaceous characters and a hint of minerality that is typical of the region. Texturally, it is very elegant and delivers a sophisticated version of a very popular white wine variety. Crafted for immediate enjoyment but will cellar over a short term under ideal conditions.
name: Jaraman Sauvignon Blanc

long_description: The wine displays lovely passionfruit and gooseberry aromas, along with hints of fresh limes. The palate is generous juicy, tropical fruit flavours are balanced by refreshing mineral acidity, which follows through to a long crisp finish. Well worth a try.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Looking for a change from a New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc, well you're in luck. La Promeses produce outstanding Sauvignon Blanc from the Loire Valley in France. The first whiff of this restrained wine indicates a departure from the hugely aromatic styles of Marlborough. Concentrated, crisp and refreshing, it has a delicate floral nose with an inkling of Indian spice. The palate is elegant, texturally soft with a mouthfeel of freshness and breadth.
name: Loire Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description:
Nepenthe Elevation is a collection of wines that expresses the fruit and unique characters from this diverse cool climate region.

This vibrant Sauvignon Blanc is loaded with citrus and tropical fruits supported by subtle underlying herbaceous notes.  An elegant wine displaying zippy acidity and persistence.

Recently awarded 94 points by Winestate Magazine.
  • Crafted in the Adelaide Hills
name: Elevation Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Camshorn, originally a Suffolk Sheep farm, is surrounded by the Waipara region's  Teviotdale hills. the unique suntrap climate with cool autumn nights is key to creating rich, aromatic and elegant wines. This Sauvignon Blanc is a true regional expression with vibrant grapefruit, gooseberry and herbs. Rich and complex with bright acidity for a lingering finish.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

ingredients: Produced with milk and eggs products, traces may remain
long_description: This Sauvignon Blanc from the home of the long white cloud, New Zealand, offers a bouquet of fresh flavours of tropical fruit and tomato leaves. The palate displays the distinct Marlborough characteristics of guava and tropical citrus fruits that give a rich full rounded palate. Ideally suited to drink with smoked ocean trout or Kahawai with a crisp kale salad and a good squeeze of lemon juice.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

description: CLOUDY BAY TE KOKO SAUVIGNON BLANC 750ML:EA
long_description:
Established in 1985, Cloudy Bay was one of the first five wine makers to venture into Marlborough.Cloudy Bay broke the winemaking rules to create a sophisticated style of New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc made through wild fermentation and aging in old French oak. Cloudy Bay's pioneering expression of Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc is evolving in unison with the age of their vines. Each year brings an additional nuance of complexity. Senior Winemaker Tim Heath Said One of the exciting things about Te Koko is that over the years we have honed our winemaking approach to focus on particular vineyard blocks that deliver the desired style of grapes. Te Koko is an aromatic, savoury and complex wine.
Today, Cloudy Bay not only captures the essence of Marlborough but also embodies New Zealand's luxury to the world. Cloudy Bay's Natural Luxury is a luxury of space and time, of intimate moments and nature's rarest qualities.
Te Koko is initially closed on the nose but unfurls with notes of subtle tropicality, honey and graphite. The palate is extraordinarily complete, with complex layers of peach, preserved citrus and toasted nuts. A fine line of acidity and an enticing saline minerality balance the intense core of fruit and provide a fresh, palate-cleansing finish.

94 Points -Decanter
95 Points -Wine Advocates
name: Te Koko Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: When you find yourself with a crowd to please it's handy to have a customer favourite Sauvignon Blanc ready in the fridge. Clean and crisp with excellent length, it bursts full of fruit flavours in the glass and gives plenty more pricey examples a run for their money. Have it with fish and chips or a summer inspired grilled chicken salad. Perfect for casual BBQs.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: New Stoneleigh Lighter Sauvignon Blanc is a full-flavoured wine that is naturally lighter in alcohol. This wine presents uplifted aromas of pink grapefruit, yellow capsicum and splashings of passionfruit. The palate presents fresh citrus flavours bound with stone fruit and passionfruit. This is a very versatile wine that can be matched with raw oysters, mussels or clam dishes. Equally good would be a fresh Caesar salad topped with smoked chicken. This wine is best enjoyed young, while expressing its unique vibrant and fresh flavours, only seen in Marlbororugh Sauvignon Blanc.
name: Lighter Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: The legend behind Fifth Leg goes a little like this... Not far from the Devil's Lairwinery in Margaret River there is a cave with the same name. During somearchaeological digging the fossilised remains of a Tasmanian tiger were found,together with a mysterious 'fifth leg'.The Semillon Sauvignon Blanc is a vibrant and crisp wine with refreshing acidityand balance. It's full of zesty, vivacious fruit with notes of lychee andpassionfruit.Winemaker Comments - Matt GodfreyVintage Region: Western AustraliaGrape Variety: 54% Semillon and 46% Sauvignon BlancMaturation: Stainless steel.Colour: Brilliant white with a vibrant green tinge.Nose: Vibrant, lifted and fresh. Citrus, snow pea and freshly cut grass aromas areintertwined with subtle tropical notes of guava and gooseberry.Palate: An explosion of passionfruit and lychee flavours with nuances of freshly cutgrass and green beans. A refreshing lemon citrus acidity creates a vibrant wine with acrisp finish.
name: Semillon Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description:
Bright pale straw, with a green tinge. A fragrant perfume of tinned lychees and dried pawpaw straps, complemented by elevated notes of lily flowers and lemon pith and rounded out with hints of jalapeno pepper and sherbet. A fresh and crisp palate with a lovely soft fruit core. The bright, dry finish carries lingering hints of tangy fruit, lemon pith and jalapeno. 

A classic blend of elegant, floral and citrus Semillon, with an infusion of powerful, aromatic and structured Sauvignon Blanc. Fermented cool using selected, organic varietal yeast to enhance the vibrant fruit expression and textural elements. Another low yielding vintage for Semillon and Sauvignon Blanc has delivered a soft and full fruit core while still containing crunchy, fresh acidity.
  • A fresh and crisp palate with a lovely soft fruit core.

  • Vegan.

  • Egg Free.

  • Lactose Free.

  • No added Colours.

  • No artificial Flavours..
name: Classic Dry White 750ml

description: LINDEMANS EARLY HARVEST SEMILLON SAUV BLANC 750ML:EA
long_description: The Lindeman's Early Harvest wines are 25% lighter in alcohol and calories (when compared to wine stated on the bottle), so you can enjoy great tasting wines as part of a lighter lifestyle. This Lindeman's Early Harvest Semillon Sauvignon Blanc is beautifully aromatic with citrus and tropical notes, and with a crisp and refreshing finish.
name: Early Harvest Semillon Sauv Blanc 750ml

description: EVANS & TATE CLASSIC MARGARET RIVER SEM SAUV BLAN 750ML:EA
long_description: Evans & Tate pretty much rule the roost when it comes to classic white blends from the west. This is a vibrant and zesty display of tropical fruits, freshly cut grass, green apple and zingy lime. It's got great persistence and screams out for seafood finish.
name: Classic Margaret River Sem Sauv Blan 750ml

name: Beef Slow Cook Chuck Roast
description: COLES BEEF SLOW COOK CHUCK ROAST
long_description:
Coles Australian Beef Slow Cook Chuck Roast 1.3kg - 1.6kg

  • 100% Australian beef
  • Slow cook roast
  • No added hormones


This Coles Australian Beef Slow Cook Chuck Roast is perfect for slow cooking and becomes tender and juicier the longer it's cooked. It's made from 100% Australian beef, raised without added hormones and carefully selected for quality and taste.


Coles Australian Beef Slow Cook Chuck Roast has a rich and hearty flavour that's well worth the wait. It's roasted low and slow until it's fall-off-the-bone tender with crispy golden-brown pieces.


Coles Australian Beef Slow Cook Chuck Roast pairs well with all types of root vegetables like carrots, parsnips and sweet potato and is delicious over creamy mashed potato with a side of vibrant green beans and doused in gravy made from all the flavour-packed pan juices.


Leftover beef is lovely baked into flaky pastry pies or incorporated into all types of casseroles and stews with plenty of aromatic herbs like thyme, rosemary and bay leaves for extra flavour.

name: Graze Grassfed Beef Diced Steak
description: COLES GRAZE GRASSFED BEEF DICED STEAK 500G
long_description: GRASS FED 100% AUSTRALIAN BEEF FREE TO ROAM NO ADDED HORMONES Graze is proudly brought to you by our Aussie Farmers in partnership with Coles. Individually selected to high standards, our livestock are raised in the open pastures across the scenic farms of Australia. From the New South Wales Tablelands, Victoria's North East Gippsland areas to South Australia's Limestone Coast and the Great Southern Region of Western Australia, our Farmers work with nature to produce great tasting, quality grass fed beef. Graze beef standards at www.grazebeef.com.au

name: Beef Strips With Bulgogi Marinade
description: COLES BEEF STRIPS WITH BULGOGI MARINADE 500GRAM
long_description:
Coles Beef Strips with Bulgogi Marinade 500g


  • 100% Australian beef
  • No added hormones
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Beef Strips with Bulgogi Marinade are deliciously tender strips of 100% Australian-grown beef marinated in a savoury yet sweet Korean-style bulgogi sauce. This popular dish is full of flavour including soy sauce, garlic, honey and a blend of spices.


Usually served with rice, kimchi and salad, these Coles Beef Strips with Bulgogi Marinade are incredibly versatile and easy to cook. Simply pan fry with a little oil or barbeque over high heat for about 4-5 minutes, turning frequently until beef is lovely and caramelised, with lightly charred edges. Coles Beef Strips with Bulgogi Marinade are made from local Australian beef, raised without added hormones and carefully selected for quality and taste. It can be used to create a variety of delectable dishes, that are ready in minutes, perfect for mid-week meals. Try serving with a spicy bean sprout salad and top with shredded carrot, sliced spring onions and sesame seeds.
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: No Added Hormones Australian Beef (90%), Bulgogi Marinade (9%) [Sugar, Soy Sauce Powder, Dehydrated Vegetables (Tomato, Garlic), Maltodextrin, Honey Powder, Vinegar Powder, Natural Colours (150a, Paprika Oleoresins), Natural Flavour, Fructose, Spices, Salt, Vegetable Gums (415, 412), Smoke Flavour], Water.

name: Free Range RSPCA Chicken Peri Peri
description: COLES FREE RANGE RSPCA CHICKEN PERI PERI
long_description:
Coles Free Range Boneless Whole Chicken Peri Peri 900g


  • 100% Australian-grown chicken
  • RSPCA approved farming
  • 4-star health rating


This Coles Free Range Boneless Whole Chicken Peri Peri is made with succulent Australian-grown chicken, sourced from Aussie farmers and suppliers who share our passion for great tasting, quality chicken and RSPCA-approved farming.


A classic crowd favourite this Coles Free Range Boneless Whole Chicken Peri Peri is ready in around 30 minutes on the barbeque or 45 minutes in the oven. When it's cooked through, cover with foil to rest before serving with your favourite grilled vegetables or pasta salads. For a quick and impressive dinner or weekend lunch, arrange slices of Coles Free Range Boneless Whole Chicken Peri Peri over a bed of spiced rice and serve with lime wedges, fresh tomato salad and corn on the cob. Simply delicious and so easy to pull together. And Coles Free Range Boneless Whole Chicken Peri Peri doesn't just taste great, it has a 4-star health rating and no artificial colours and flavours.

Raised by Lilydale Farmers on Lilydale Farms.

At Lilydale, our chickens are raised by farmers who really care about their welfare. They are fed a nutritious diet and - once adequately feathered at around 21 days - can leave their barns during daylight hours and access fenced outdoor range areas. Many chickens are content with the comforts of their barn but during an average day and depending on conditions like the weather, some chickens will venture out and return at their leisure. Our commitment to free range farming has helped us to provide Australians with quality, great tasting chickens since 2002.
  • Raised without antibiotics

  • No added hormones

  • No added growth promotants

  • Australian grown chicken

name: Free Range Whole Chicken
long_description:
Raised by Lilydale Farmers on Lilydale Farms.

At Lilydale, our chickens are raised by farmers who really care about their welfare. They are fed a nutritious diet and - once adequately feathered at around 21 days - can leave their barns during daylight hours and access fenced outdoor range areas. Many chickens are content with the comforts of their barn but during an average day and depending on conditions like the weather, some chickens will venture out and return at their leisure. Our commitment to free range farming has helped us to provide Australians with quality, great tasting chickens since 2002.
  • Raised without Antibiotics

  • No added hormones

  • No added growth promotants

  • Australian Grown

name: RSPCA Approved Chicken Tropical Bites With Bacon & Pineapple
description: COLES RSPCA CHICKEN TROPICAL BITES WITH BACON AND PINEAPPLE
long_description:
Coles Tropical Chicken Bites with Bacon and Pineapple 430g


  • Made with Australian chicken
  • RSPCA approved farming
  • Ready in 10 minutes


These Coles Tropical Chicken Bites with Bacon and Pineapple are certified crowd favourites, perfect for kid-friendly meals or easy party food platters. They feature succulent chicken pieces, bacon and real pineapple, wrapped in a crispy crumb coating. Coles Tropical Chicken Bites with Bacon and Pineapple are made from 100% Australian-grown chicken that's sourced from Aussie farmers and suppliers who share our passion for great tasting, quality chicken and RSPCA-approved farming. And they're ready in the oven or air fryer in just 10 minutes, helping you get dinner on the table, fast.


You can serve Coles Tropical Chicken Bites with Bacon and Pineapple with a creamy dipping sauce as finger food for parties, or plate up alongside some potato mash and a simple green salad. Or lean into the tropical vibe and serve over coconut rice with a vibrant mango salad for a mid-week dinner that's sure to be a hit.

name: Chicken Breast Strips Crumbed
long_description:
Raised by Lilydale Farmers on Lilydale Farms.

At Lilydale, our chickens are raised by farmers who really care about their welfare. They are fed a nutritious diet and - once adequately feathered at around 21 days - can leave their barns during daylight hours and access fenced outdoor range areas. Many chickens are content with the comforts of their barn but during an average day and depending on conditions like the weather, some chickens will venture out and return at their leisure. Our commitment to free range farming has helped us to provide Australians with quality, great tasting chickens since 2002.
  • Raised without antibiotics

  • No added hormones

  • No added growth promotants

  • Australian Grown

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • No added preservatives.

name: Free Range Rustic Chicken Breast Schnitzel
description: LILYDALE FREE RANGE RUSTIC CHICKEN BREAST SCHNITZEL
long_description:
Raised by Lilydale Farmers on Lilydale Farms.

At Lilydale, our chickens are raised by farmers who really care about their welfare. They are fed a nutritious diet and - once adequately feathered at around 21 days - can leave their barns during daylight hours and access fenced outdoor range areas. Many chickens are content with the comforts of their barn but during an average day and depending on conditions like the weather, some chickens will venture out and return at their leisure. Our commitment to free range farming has helped us to provide Australians with quality, great tasting chickens since 2002.
ingredients: Free Range Chicken Breast (66%), Rustic Coating (27%) [Wheat Flour, Oats, Buckwheat Flour (Wheat, Barley, Soy), Oats Flour (Wheat), Quinoa Flour, Vegetable Oil, Herbs (Parsley, Thyme, Rosemary), Spice (Pepper), Wheat Gluten, Yeast, Salt, Sugar, Mineral Salts (503, 500, 541, 450) Colour (150a), Water, Thickener (1404), Soy Flour, Emulsifier (322 (Soy)), Dehydrated Vegetables (Onion, Garlic, Celery), Spices (Paprika, Pepper, Celery (Wheat)), Natural Chicken Roast Flavour, Yeast Extract], Vegetable Oil, Thickener (1442), Maltodextrin, Mineral Salts (451, 450, 452).

name: Turkey Rissoles
long_description:
Steggles Turkey Rissoles with parsley & onion are perfect for sliders or try in a wrap! Turkey is nature's supermeat. It is one of the leanest meat protein sources. Turkey is in rich in nutrients niacin, selenium, vitamins B6 and B12, and zinc. These nutrients are known to promote a healthy heart and strong immune system.

All Steggles Turkeys are raised in large barns and are free from any added hormones.

We're Steggles for quality time.

Quality Time. It's never been more important to a family. Its time spent together. It's about creating real family connections - the laughter, the stories and the conversations. Which is why at Steggles we want to remind all Australian families just how special mealtime is around the table.

After all, we're not just Stegglers for quality, we're Stegglers for quality time.
  • Good source of protein

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • All Steggles turkeys are raised in large barns

  • Our turkeys have no added hormones

name: Cooked Duck Breasts Peking Flavoured
description: LUV A DUCK COOKED DUCK BREASTS PEKING FLAVOURED
long_description:
Experience the exceptional flavour and tenderness of Australian Farmed Luv-a-Duck. Our ducks are grown in the Wimmera region of Victoria and fed on locally sourced grain, delivering a rich, natural flavour and texture.

An Asian classic, Luv-a-Duck's tender and delicious Peking Flavoured Duck Breasts have been cooked long and slow so you can simply heat and serve.

Serving suggestions: Enjoy whole or slice and use for stir-fries, wraps, salads, pizzas or curries!

Ready in 4 easy cooking steps:
1. Pre-heat fan-forced oven to 190°C (200°C conventional)
2. Remove duck breasts from pouch and place skin side up on a lined baking tray
3. Heat in oven for 15-20 minutes
4. Remove from oven and rest for 2-3 minutes before serving
Visitluvaduck.com.au/hints-tips for more details.

See pack for Air Fryer and Microwave instructions.

Luv-a-Duck is a third-generation family-owned Australian company dedicated to producing quality duck products.

name: Fresh Duck Breast Fillets
long_description:
Experience the exceptional flavour and tenderness of Australian Farmed Luv-a-Duck. Our ducks are grown in the Wimmera region of Victoria and fed on locally sourced grain, delivering a rich, natural flavour and texture.

Expertly trimmed and prepared to deliver tender meat with a perfect layer of golden, crisp skin during cooking.

Ideal for pan-searing, grilling, or roasting.

Ready in 5 easy cooking steps:
1. Pre-heat fan-forced oven to 190°C (200°C conventional)
2. Pat the duck dry with a paper towel. Season with salt to create a crispy skin (for extra crispy skin; leave the duck uncovered in the fridge for up to two days before cooking).
3. Place the duck breast side up on a rack in a roasting tray
4. Roast for 40 minutes per kg, until the skin is crispy and golden
5. Rest for 20 minutes before portioning.
Visit luvaduck.com.au/hints-tips/ for more details.

Luv-a-Duck is a third-generation family-owned Australian company dedicated to producing quality duck products.

long_description:
Experience the exceptional flavour of Australian Farmed Luv-a-Duck duck fat. Our ducks are grown in the Wimmera region of Victoria and fed on locally sourced grain, delivering a rich and natural flavour.

Duck Fat is perfect for making the most delicious golden roast potatoes and is an essential ingredient used when to make a traditional French style confit dishes.

For our classic Luv-a-Duck Roast Potatoes recipe, visit www.luvaduck.com.au/recipes/view/duck-fat-roast-potatoes/

long_description:
Experience the exceptional flavour and tenderness of Australian Farmed Luv-a-Duck. Our ducks are grown in the Wimmera region of Victoria and fed on locally sourced grain, delivering a rich, natural flavour and texture.

This convenient pack includes Peking Flavoured Duck Breasts, 10 Chinese style Pancakes and Hoisin Sauce, everything you need to prepare a simple and delicious meal.

Simply add spring onions and cucumber to create the authentic experience!

Luv-a-Duck is a third-generation family-owned Australian company dedicated to producing quality duck products.

description: COLES LAMB SHOULDER ROAST ON THE BONE
long_description:
5+ Days Life: Guaranteed minimum product life for 5 days, excluding delivery day. Life highly likely to exceed minimum.

Full of flavour, this cut is a great choice for delicious slow roasts and stews. Roast it with the bone in for maximum flavour - and to create that meltoff-the-bone effect - covering with foil to help retain moisture throughout the long cooking time. Remove the foil for the last 30 minutes of roasting for a crispier skin and always rest after roasting for juicy results.

name: Graze Lamb Leg Steak 2pack
description: COLES GRAZE LAMB LEG STEAK 2PK:270 GRAM
long_description:
Coles Graze Lamb Leg Steak 270g


  • 100% Australian lamb
  • Beautifully lean and flavourful
  • Serves 2


Coles Graze Lamb Leg Steak is proudly brought to you by Aussie Farmers in partnership with Coles. Our lamb is 100% Australian, selected to high standards and raised on abundant, open pastures without antibiotics.


Coles Graze Lamb Leg Steak is full of flavour and beautifully lean. It's best grilled on the barbeque or pan fried until golden and takes just 4 to 5 minutes per side for medium doneness. For maximum tenderness and flavour, cover with foil and set aside for 5 minutes to rest before serving. Once it's cooked and rested you can serve Coles Graze Lamb Leg Steak in any number of ways. Plate up with grilled vegetables and serve alongside buttery baby potatoes and top with fresh herbs for a deliciously simple meal that tastes sensational. Or whip up a delicious spiced couscous with zesty lemon and fresh mint and serve with a generous drizzle of tzatziki.

name: Pork 3 Star Regular Mince
long_description:
Coles Pork 3 Star Regular Mince 800g


  • 100% Australian pork
  • Free from artificial growth promotants
  • Perfect for burgers


This Coles Pork 3 Star Regular Mince uses best practice farming and the highest quality Australian pork belly to create succulent mince that's full of flavour. Perfect for whipping up a range of meals at home.


Coles Pork 3 Star Regular Mince is extremely versatile and easy to cook making it the idea base for so many dishes. It can be shaped into patties for burgers, rolled into meatballs, wrapped into dumplings and wontons or stuffed into pitas. For a delicious dinner that's on the table in 15 minutes, cook mince in a large frying pan until it's nice browned then add soy sauce, garlic and ginger and finely chopped crunchy veges like carrot and baby corn. Serve in lettuce cups topped with crushed peanuts. Quick and easy and full of flavour. Coles Pork 3 Star Regular Mince not only tastes great, it's also free from artificial growth promotants and preservatives making it a great choice for the whole family.

name: Quick Cook Pork Belly Slices
description: COLES QUICK COOK PORK BELLY SLICES 350G
long_description:
Coles Quick Cook Pork Belly Slices 350g


  • 100% Australian pork
  • Quick cook
  • No artificial growth promotants


Coles Quick Cook Pork Belly Slices are made with local pork sourced from Aussie farmers who share our passion for best practice farming and great tasting meat. Pork belly slices are naturally higher in fat than most other pork cuts with a ratio of lean meat to fat that makes them perfect for marinating. Coles Quick Cook Pork Belly Slices take just a few minutes per side on the barbeque or in a hot pan until the fats caramelise and turn golden brown and crispy while the meat stays tender and succulent. Once cooked, sprinkle Coles Quick Cook Pork Belly Slices with spring onion and sesame seeds and serve over fluffy rice or use as a delicious topper for homemade ramen or pile into buns along with coleslaw


All Coles Brand fresh pork is 100% Australian grown, sow stall free, and produced without artificial growth promotants so you can feel confident you're getting premium quality pork, every time.

name: Pork Sirloin Steak
long_description:
Coles Pork Sirloin Steak 500g


  • 100% Australian pork
  • Perfect for the barbeque
  • No artificial growth promotants


Coles Pork Sirloin Steak is made with local pork sourced from Aussie farmers who share our passion for best practice farming and great tasting meat. Pork sirloin steak is a lean cut that comes from the back part of the loin of the pig and has a little bit of fat making it juicy and full of flavour. Coles Pork Sirloin Steak is boneless and perfect for barbequing or pan frying. It cooks quickly and takes just 3 to 4 minutes per side until it's crisp and golden brown on the outside and succulent on the inside. Once cooked, remember to allow the steaks to rest for a few minutes to ensure all the delicious juices are retained. Then serve Coles Pork Sirloin Steak with your favourite salad or alongside some creamy, mashed potatoes and grilled veges.

Coles Pork Sirloin Steak not only tastes great, it's also 100% Australian grown, sow stall free, and produced without artificial growth promotants.

description: COLES PORK LOIN STEAKS THIN CUT 500G

We work with farmers and suppliers who meet our high standards of quality and animal welfare. We believe that the best quality pork comes from pigs that grow and mature naturally. That's why all Coles Brand fresh pork is 100% Australian Grown, sow stall free and produced without artificial growth promotants. So, you can feel confident you're getting consistently great taste and quality every time. Cut Guide LOIN Pork sirloin steaks come from towards the back of the loin of the pig and have a little bit of fat and lean meat which makes them perfect for the BBQ or cooking in a hot pan.

name: Pork Fillet
long_description: Pork fillet is extremely tender, naturally lean and one of the healthiest cuts available. It can be cooked whole or cut into small round medallions and is delicious when pan fried. Finish off in the oven before serving for best results. Cook to a slightly blushing pink and always rest the fillet to seal in the moisture. Thinly sliced pork fillet is ideal for stir fries.All our Coles Brand fresh pork is 100% Australian grown by Aussie farmers. Pigs are sourced from farms that comply with the Australian Pork Industry Quality Assurance Program Customer Specifications for Coles Supermarkets Australia Pty Ltd. This means that the farms are sow-stall free and pigs are free from artificial growth promotants.

name: Pork Scotch Fillet Steak
description: COLES PORK SCOTCH FILLET STEAK 300 GRAM
long_description:
Coles Pork Scotch Fillet Steak 300g


  • 100% Australian pork
  • Pan fry or barbeque
  • No artificial growth promotants


Coles Pork Scotch Fillet Steak is made with local pork sourced from Aussie farmers who share our passion for best practice farming and great tasting meat. Pork scotch fillet steaks are a delicious cut with some fat marbling through them making them ideal for pan frying or barbequing. It takes just 4 to 5 minutes per side for the fat to render giving Coles Pork Scotch Fillet Steak the perfect eating texture that's golden brown on the outside and juicy and tender on the inside. Serve with a simple green salad and some crispy smashed potatoes, or whip up a fantastic stir fry with strips of Coles Pork Scotch Fillet Steak and crunchy veges served over fluffy rice and a sprinkling of spring onion and sesame seeds.


Coles Pork Scotch Fillet Steak not only tastes great, it's also 100% Australian grown, sow stall free, and produced without artificial growth promotants so you know you're getting premium quality pork, every time.

name: Pork Sizzle Steaks

Coles Australian Pork Sizzle Steaks are made with local pork sourced from Aussie farmers who share our passion for best practice farming and great tasting meat. Sizzle steaks are a cut of steak that's sliced thinly making them quick and easy to cook. Coles Australian Pork Sizzle Steaks take just 1-2 minutes per side on the barbeque or in a hot pan until they're golden brown and ready to be devoured. Once cooked, you can serve Coles Australian Pork Sizzle Steaks with creamy mushroom sauce alongside crispy, smashed potatoes and steamed veges. Or make the perfect pork schnitzels with a panko breadcrumb coating and serve with apple and potato mash for a quick and tasty meal-week meal.


Coles Australian Pork Sizzle Steaks are not only delicious, they're also 100% Australian grown, sow stall free, and produced without artificial growth promotants so you can feel confident you're getting premium quality pork, every time.

name: Free Range Pork Leg Roast Boneless
description: COLES FREE RANGE PORK LEG ROAST BONELESS
long_description:
4+ Days Life: Guaranteed minimum product life for 4 days, excluding delivery day. Life highly likely to exceed minimum.

This boneless cut is an ideal family roast and easy to carve. Slightly less fat than the shoulder roast but still packed with flavour.

Sourced from farming families that work with Milne Agrigroup in WA, all Coles Brand Free Range fresh pork is humanely raised under the RSPCA Approved farming scheme. This means the pigs have space to move, forage, socialise and explore. Sows are not confined to sow stalls or farrowing crates. Instead, they have good quality bedding in a free farrowing environment which provides a comfortable area to rest and material to perform their natural nesting behaviours.

name: Free Range Pork Mince Wa
description: COLES FREE RANGE PORK MINCE WA
long_description: PERFECT FOR DUMPLINGS / FREE FROM ARTIFICIAL GROWTH PROMOTANTS / FREE TO ROAMDISCOVER FREE RANGE FARMINGWe have proudly sourced all of our Free Range Pork from a handpicked group of RSPCA Approved farms that have the ideal combination of climate and soil, which creates the perfect conditions for pigs to roam freely, socialise, and of course do their favourite thing, forage!

name: Free Range Pork Fillet
long_description:
4+ Days Life: Guaranteed minimum product life for 4 days, excluding delivery day. Life highly likely to exceed minimum.

Pork fillet is extremely tender, naturally lean and one of the healthiest cuts available. It can be cooked whole or cut into small round medallions and is delicious when pan fried. Finish off in the oven before serving for best results. Cook to a slightly blushing pink and always rest the fillet to seal in the moisture. Thinly sliced pork fillet is ideal for stir fries.

Sourced from farming families that work with Milne Agrigroup in WA, all Coles Brand Free Range fresh pork is humanely raised under the RSPCA Approved farming scheme. This means the pigs have space to move, forage, socialise and explore. Sows are not confined to sow stalls or farrowing crates. Instead, they have good quality bedding in a free farrowing environment which provides a comfortable area to rest and material to perform their natural nesting behaviours.

name: Free Range Pork Belly Slices
description: COLES FREE RANGE PORK BELLY SLICES 400 GRAM (11X5)
long_description:
Coles Free Range Pork Belly Slices 400g


  • 100% Australian pork
  • RSPCA approved certification
  • No artificial growth promotants


Coles Free Range Pork Belly Slices are proudly sourced from a handpicked group of farms with RSPCA approved certification and the perfect conditions for pigs to freely roam, socialise, and forage.


Pork belly slices are naturally higher in fat than most other pork cuts with a ratio of lean meat to fat that make them deliciously meaty and juicy. Perfect for marinating and barbequing, Coles Free Range Pork Belly Slices take just 4 minutes per side for the fats to caramelise and turn golden brown while the meat stays tender. Once cooked, you can chop Coles Free Range Pork Belly Slices into small pieces for fried rice, or serve with steamed vegetables and drizzle with a sweet barbeque sauce before topping with sesame seeds.


Coles Free Range Pork Belly Slices not only taste great, they're also produced without artificial growth promotants so you can feel confident you're getting premium quality pork, every time.

name: Beechwood Smoked Picnic Ham
long_description:
Semi-boneless Ham from the shoulder not the leg. Single smoked over Beechwood. Light golden brown rind colour with some white fat showing on the edges of the ham where the butchery lines are. It is a more specialised ham as hams are typically from back legs of the animal.


The ham is best served in chunky pieces don't try and carve this too perfectly as you will be disappointed - it's boned out and can come apart. The bone part of the ham is more for presentation as the main part of the ham is boneless and can be carved straight through. Care needs to be taken when working up to the bone end so always carve with the ham securely situated on a cutting board.

name: Turkey Mince
long_description:
Steggles Turkey is nature's supermeat. It is one of the leanest meat protein sources. Turkey is in rich in nutrients niacin, selenium, vitamins B6 and B12, and zinc. These nutrients are known to promote a healthy heart and strong immune system.

All Steggles Turkeys are raised in large barns and are free from any added hormones.

We're Steggles for quality time.

Quality Time. It's never been more important to a family. Its time spent together. It's about creating real family connections - the laughter, the stories and the conversations. Which is why at Steggles we want to remind all Australian families just how special mealtime is around the table.

After all, we're not just Stegglers for quality, we're Stegglers for quality time.
  • Good source of protein

  • No added preservatives

  • All Steggles turkeys are raised in large barns

  • Our turkeys have no added hormones

name: RSPCA Approved Chicken Breast Mince
long_description:
Coles RSPCA Approved Chicken Breast Mince 500g


  • 100% Australian-grown chicken
  • Typically less than 2% fat
  • Perfect for dumplings


This Coles RSPCA Approved Chicken Breast Mince is a go-to, family favourite perfect for whipping up a range of meals at home. With succulent chicken and typically less than 2% fat, it's a great choice for the whole family.


Made from 100% Australian-grown chicken, Coles RSPCA Approved Chicken Breast Mince is sourced from Aussie farmers and suppliers who share our passion for great tasting, quality chicken and RSPCA-approved farming. Coles RSPCA Approved Chicken Breast Mince is extremely versatile and easy to cook making it the perfect base for so many dishes. It can be shaped into patties for burgers, rolled into meatballs, or wrapped up into dumplings. Whether you're making breakfast, lunch or dinner, Coles RSPCA Approved Chicken Breast Mince can be used in almost endless ways. Simply pan fry in a little oil until nicely browned and stir through your favourite herbs and spices to create flavourful, meals packed with goodness.

name: Slow Cooked Pork Belly Bites In Bbq Honey
description: COLES MADE EASY SLOW COOKED  PORK BELLY BITES IN BBQ HONEY500G
long_description:
Coles Made Easy Slow Cooked Honey BBQ Pork Belly Bites 500g


  • Australian pork
  • Serves 2
  • Ready in 15 mins


These Coles Made Easy Slow Cooked Honey BBQ Pork Belly Bites are part of our slow cooked range of easy meals and feature bite-sized pieces of Australian pork belly in a sticky honey barbeque sauce. They're braised for 5 hours and are ready in the oven or air fryer in just 15 minutes, giving you all the melt-in-the-mouth flavours of slow cooking without the wait.


For a simple yet delicious dinner, serve Coles Made Easy Slow Cooked Honey BBQ Pork Belly Bites over fluffy steamed rice and sprinkle with sliced spring onion, red chilli and sesame seeds. Great for no-fuss meals, any night of the week. You can also make soft tacos by folding Coles Made Easy Slow Cooked Honey BBQ Pork Belly Bites into mini tortillas topped with slaw and a squeeze of fresh lime. Or create deli-style baguettes along with chopped lettuce, pickles, jalapeno chillis and chipotle mayo.

name: Prawns Raw Peeled
long_description: COMMITTED TO GOOD THINGS RESPONSIBLY SOURCED SEAFOOD At Coles, we care about where our seafood comes from and are committed to working towards a sustainable future. That's why all Coles Brand seafood has been responsibly sourced since 2015. We understand that well-managed and responsible fishing and aquaculture is essential to maintaining healthy fish populations and habitats, helping to ensure the future sustainability of marine ecosystems. That's good for the oceans, aquaculture, and our customers. LOOKING FOR INSPIRATION Quick and simple to cook, these Raw Prawns make the perfect addition to any seafood dish. They make for a tasty snack when pan fried and tossed through a simple garlic butter or sweet chilli sauce. If cooking for a crowd, why not make the perfect summer meal by marinating prawns in a lemon and herb marinade, thread onto skewers and cook on a searing hot BBQ. Whichever way you like to cook yours, we recommend a generous squeeze of fresh lemon juice to complement any prawn dish.

long_description: Committed to good things RESPONSIBLY SOURCED SEAFOOD At Coles, we care about where our seafood comes from and are committed to working towards a sustainable future. That's why all Coles Brand seafood has been responsibly sourced since 2015. We understand that well-managed and responsible fishing and aquaculture are essential to maintaining healthy fish populations and habitats, helping to ensure the future sustainability of marine ecosystems. That's good for the oceans, aquaculture, and our customers. LOOKING FOR INSPIRATION Our prawns come cooked and ready to eat for your convenience. Simply dip into the traditional seafood cocktail sauce for a quick and delicious snack. If you're looking for something a bit more substantial, gently toss the prawns though a green salad and use the dipping sauce as an easy and delicious dressing. Our prawns come with their tails still intact, making them easy to pick up and dip.

name: Tasmanian Salmon Marinated Portions Teriyaki
description: COLES TASMANIAN SALMON MARINATED PORTIONS TERIYAKI
long_description: COMMITTED TO GOOD THINGS At Coles, we care about how the seafood we sell is sourced and produced. When sourcing our seafood we recognise a range of certification and assessment programs. For farmed (aquaculture) seafood Coles Own Brand products must be certified by: Aquaculture Stewardship Council (ASC); Best Aquaculture Practices (BAP); or GLOBALG.A.P. This Atlantic salmon has been raised in the cool waters of Tasmania and is carefully selected for its quality and freshness.
